name: Karun
bio:
Karun is an R&B/Soul singer, songwriter and music producer based in Nairobi. She makes raw, honest, and meditative music with the intention of easing the daily anxieties of anyone who plays her music.

Karun’s catalogue consists of notable R&B singles such as “Only You - A COLORS SHOW”,  “Here With Me” - an Afro-pop inspired love song off her sophomore EP “Catch A Vibe”, and “Glow Up” a body positive anthem that was premiered on Mr Eazi’s Empawa Africa program. 

Some notable collaborations include “Video Games” with South African R&B singer Ricky Tyler, “Anticipate” with Xenia Manasseh, and “Imagination” by Cedo ft Nyashinski and herself.
Karun also features on songs with Grammy award winning artists such as Juls’ on “Say You Love Me”, and Savara of Sauti sol’s “VIBRATION”. 

She has made notable career strides in her decade long career such as being featured on Forbes Top 30 Under 30 Africa list (2019), won awards and nominations namely "R&B artist of the year"  (Cafe Ngoma Awards) and Afrima (nomination) 2021, had her songs featured in films and ad placements such as her song “Interlude (Sun)” in Fox TV’s “The Resident” (S02E12), and collaborated with multiple Brands such as Focusrite, Nivea and more.

Every chapter of Karun’s journey marks a new version of herself. And for that reason she is always “only just beginning”, stay tuned for her next project “À nu”.

name: Karyendasoul
bio:
A Mastermind of his own sound, Bonga Ntozini - better known as Karyenadasoul - has founded his career on an ever evolving understanding of sonic and musical sophistication. From his fluency behind the decks, to a multifaceted musical aptitude in the studio, he is renowned for well orchestrated productions where soulful elements take centerstage. Like The platinum selling record ‘iMali’ fuse African soundscapes and vocals with electronic elements, ‘Something More’ with Jordan arts is an edgy and striking composition, whilst ‘Umthandazo’ and  ‘Jacaranda’ (featuring Ami Faku and Msaki respectively) take us on an all encompassing, uplifting Afro House journey.

A captivating virtuoso of boundless sonic possibility, he has co-produced alongside Zakes Bantwini & Kasango on the 2021 hit ‘Osama’ and with Black Coffee  on the hit record ‘Any Other Way ft ZHao;Karyendasoul’s talent and tireless work ethic , combined with a prolific and consistent release shcedule has established him as one of the most compelling artists within both the African and International Electronic Music scenes.

With a career built on a string of well deserved accolades, a consistent delivery of refined euphoric productions and a glowing reputation amongst a network of equally well respected artists within the scene; Karyendasoul was able to build WeLive4OurMusic. His piece-de-resistance comprised of ten records, in a musical voyage reflecting his versatility and innovation. WL4OM opens with its lead title - a collaboration with BokkieUlt featuring an otherworldly vocal from Sai Hle - setting the tone for the ensuing 67 minutes. Karyendasoul calls on the vocal prowess of Miči, Ami Faku, Jordan Arts, Simmy,Zakes Bantwini, Msaki and Sykes in a sonic tapestry weaved with his characteristically meandering arps and synths, cosmic afro house grooves, with provocative displays of percussive flair building energy throughout. The conclusion, a seven minute solo cut showcasing the best of Karyendasoul’s distinctive sound, powerful melodies and drum patterns coalesce from the start - before an intense string inspired refrain builds to a climatic reintroduction of the main elements; in a faultless finale to a mellifluous masterpiece.

In the wake of what continues to be an excellent reception of a debut album; Karyendasoul has built his WL4OM tour traveling across Africa, Asia, America and Europe - sharing his trademark sound and awe inspiring live performances on the International stage. His reputation continues to grow, his work ethic stands strong and with a string of upcoming projects on the horizon, we eagerly await what sonic spectacles Karyendasoul will unveil next.

https://linktr.ee/Karyendasoul

name: KASIA
bio:
Wrapped in the loving embrace of rave culture, KASIA’s sound weaves sublime energy arcs that dissolve time and space and lay bare a primeval realm of consciousness. Melding ephemeral melancholia with high-energy melodic techno, KASIA plums the depths of the human experience, stripping away all distractions and forging transcendent soundscapes that unleash torrents of unadulterated emotionality. 

A trained drummer from an early age, KASIA’s percussive brand of melodic techno pairs powerful grooves with incandescent synths, otherworldly atmospheres, and a sense of enigmatic mysticism that enthralls listeners across the world. Driving, euphoric, and deeply introspective, her tracks and sets transport a life-affirming spirituality that explores and connects with the deepest levels of our inner selves.

Boasting support from Martin Garrix, Tiesto, Avicii, The Chainsmokers, Showtek, Knife Party, David Guetta, and many more, Ray Decker better known as “Kastra” has made quite a name for himself in a few short years. Born and raised on the Jersey Shore, a community deeply rooted in music history, Kastra is a true product of his environment.
 
In 2019, Kastra secured his first top 10 Billboard Dance record with his single "U & Me" which was also selected as a BPM Breaker on Sirius XM. He also landed a major collaboration with one of EDM's hottest artists Timmy Trumpet . Timmy and Kastra released "Wassup", a disco inspired dance track with house legend Chuck Roberts, which quickly soared to 10 million Spotify streams and hit number 1 on Australia's Metro Radio.
​
Kastra has released various singles and remixes on some of the dance music industries top labels including Spinnin Records, Armada Music, Musical Freedom, Ultra Records, Enhanced Music, and Ministry of Sound. He has done official remixes for Showtek, 3LAU , Ava Max , Madison Mars, Sultan + Shepard, and many more.
​
In this short amount of time, he’s gained the support for his free and official releases from EDM’s top blogs including Dancing Astronaut, This Song is Sick, Fresh New Track, Your EDM, and many more noting him as “one of the most under rated house producers out at the moment ”.

name: Kate Moss
bio:
Kate Moss is carving out a unique path in the electronic, melodic, tech music scene , already proving that her determination, ambition, and relentless work ethic will take her all the way to the top. Known for her emotionally charged, high-energy sets, Kate has also begun collaborating on her own original tracks, using her own vocals, which highlights her deep dedication to her craft and her long-term vision within the industry.

She’s already shared stages with some of the world’s leading artists, having headlined on mainstages and supported the likes of Agents Of Time, Fideles, Joplyn Berlin, Francis Mercier, Alex Wann, and many more. 

Her performances across Europe , including Ibiza, Italy, Athens, Benidorm, and Alicante, with upcoming dates in Luzern and Romania, are gaining recognition far beyond borders.

Known in the industry as one of the most resilient and driven female artists, Kate doesn’t stop. Whether she’s carefully selecting beats, crafting her own productions, or performing live with her vocals layered over her sets, she brings a presence that electrifies every space she enters.

Each venue she collaborates with benefits from her professionalism and versatility. She takes the time to understand every brief, builds tailored soundscapes, and curates unique playlists that make every set its own signature moment.

A super sonic energy.. welcome to Kate's world 🌍

name: Katie Goodman
bio:
Katie Goodman is a young selector with extraordinary energy. She plays boldly with an impressive knowledge of music from the newest house party-starters to disco rarities. 

Having proved herself behind the decks at festivals like We Are FSTVL in London, Amsterdam Dance Event and Defected Croatia she is now proud to be a resident for the hottest party in the world, Glitterbox. Closely aligning with the party’s soundtrack of vocal anthems, nu-disco and soulful house, Katie’s style is intuitive and versatile due to years spent honing her skills at clubs in London and Essex. Having studied DJing and production Katie’s technique is exceptional, and while she continues to soak up the expert guidance of boss Simon Dunmore and her fellow Glitterbox residents, her future is beginning to look very bright indeed. 

Katie has supported the likes of, Dimitri From Paris, Horse Meat Disco, Eli Escobar, Purple Disco Machine and Kings of Tomorrow’s Sandy Rivera, to name only a few. Her upcoming schedule includes appearances at Amsterdam's Paradiso, Ministry of Sound, Printworks London, and festivals including Back Of Beyond, We Are FSTVL and Defected Croatia.

name: Katimi Ai
bio:
Katimi Ai is a performing artist from Tokyo, Japan. Born of Japanese and Nigerian descent, Katimi spent her youth in her studies and found love in arts with influence from both of her parents ―having a father managing a bar and a mother playing western radio shows at home, music had always followed her. After finishing her studies, she has decided to pursue her passion in music professionally.

In 2015, Katimi followed suit and kicked off her career; with her unique look and charismatic appeal, she quickly became the talk of the town in Tokyo. 

In 2017, Katimi traveled to New York to step into new territory and play to begin activations at various venues in Manhattan and Brooklyn which led her return in August 2018 for an activation with Brooklyn based venue Kinfolk 90.

In January 2019, Brooklyn based radio station HALFMOON BK tapped Katimi to be a part of their eclectic roster of resident DJs, the first from Tokyo, Japan. 

Katimi has also been producing music. 
She has joined a program called “YY project K “ in which she collaborates as a beat maker with Koto player Asuka.
They have just released their first single in May,2022.

In September 2022, she released her own debut track “Tmbt 2019” on African Tales, a record label founded by Berlin-based South African Floyd Lavine.

2015年より、DJ活動を開始。エキゾチックな容姿、そして並外れたオーラを放つことより、DJ活動を初めてまもなくから東京での様々な有名クラブ、レセプションパーティー、音楽フェスティバル等で活動している。

2017年にはニューヨークへ進出し、数々の現場をこなして、2018年夏もKinfolk 90でのゲスト出演で大盛況なプレイを果たした。
2019年1月からニューヨーク、ブルックリンでのラジオストリーム、Half-MoonBKでのマンスリーレジデントを継続中。

2022年5月にはBeat Makerとして琴奏者AsukaとのYY project Kを始動。Producerとしての活動の幅を広げている。

2022年9月にFloyd Lavine の創立するベルリンを拠点とするレーベルAfrican Talesから
”Tmbt 2019”をリリース。

bio: We are KATSEYE!

name: Katsy Lee
bio:
Hailing from Manila, Katsy Lee is the youngest and first female DJ to win the Pioneer Philippines Digital DJ Battle, ranking fourth in the Asia-Pacific Finals.

Since then, Katsy has played venues across Asia, the Middle East, America, and Europe, from London to New York, from Japan and the UAE to the Maldives. She has played support for international acts such as Miss Nine, Dannic, Mike Vale, Nicole Scherzinger, and The Vamps.

Katsy went on to release her own music internationally under homegrown labels Rewind Recordings and Tonedef Recordings, as well as Carpe Noctem Inc. (San Francisco).

Katsy also became a member of Malaysia's Groove Nation, an official Asia-Pacific representative of Ministry of Sound, Hed Kandi and Sushi Records. She is currently part of the faculty at Bounce, one of Manila's foremost DJ and music production schools.

For Katsy, music inspires the soul, and a night out illuminates and opens worlds of imagination and possibility. ‘Never Be Ordinary’! :)

Bookings: kienan@executivehouseagency.com
Promos: promos@kaysin.com

L.A. based DJ and producer Kaysin is making waves in the US house music scene. With Top 10 Beatport hits and releases on Thrive, Repopulate Mars, Sink or Swim, and Myth of Nyx, his sound is unmistakable and has been supported by influential names across the genre - from Fisher to Vintage Culture to Tiesto.

Kaysin’s remix and collaboration skills also shine through in his work with John Summit, Mindchatter, and Wenzday, with more exciting projects on the horizon with Guz, Lovra, and Dark Heart to name a few.

Beyond the production, Kaysin lends his ear for proper movers to Lee Foss’ Repopulate Mars, South of Saturn, and North of Neptune where he serves as the key A&R for all three labels. He’s been entrusted with countless demos from the biggest names in dance music, making his live shows filled with the hottest IDs. He also leads curation of South of Saturn events, hosting stacked lineups across the US.

Kaysin has toured extensively over the past few years, playing top venues in his home market in LA (Academy, Sound, and Exchange) and hotspots from New York (Superior Ingredients) to Miami (Factory Town) to Las Vegas (Discopussy) to Austin (The Concourse Project). Internationally, Kaysin has toured Canada, Mexico, and Spain, including the annual summer pilgrimage to Ibiza. He’s also a regular on the festival circuit, with performances at staples such as EDC and Day Trip LA.

name: Keinemusik
bio:
KM074 is out now
https://ffm.to/km074

Keinemusik is a network with the label as the pulse pumping centre. Driven particularly by the spirit that moves the collective behind the imprint. The spirit to find your own agenda and let nobody get in the way. The spirit of refining House and Techno off the beaten path. Be it within their own tracks, within productions of other sorts or DJ-sets. The spirit of recall value within record- and flyer-artworks and everything intermediate in word and image surrounding releases and parties. And the spirit of diversification – Rampa’s effect-gadget-venture TEILE being one example. Keinemusik’s own booking department ‘Worldwide Dancing Club’, established in 2018, being another.

Keinemusik has been around since 2009. It has been naming an existing friendship and linked interests of the four members – &ME, Adam Port, Rampa and Reznik. A more or less constant count of five releases per year have been released ever since, solely laid down by members of the crew. And a considerable count of label-parties went down, not only in Berlin, but around all international focal points for electronic music. And surely, there’s plenty more where those came from. So see you soon in a record store or on a dancefloor in your area!

name: Kento
bio:
ento’s unique mix of raw energy, his eclectic style and unique way of combining rave, bounce, groove, techno, tekno and psy, combined with his impulsive technique, his need to connect with the crowd, and capability of walking the line between genres make him a must see artist. Every set is telling a story that comes from the heart, transmitted by combining 3-4 decks non stop mixing elements creating a connecting, genuine musical experience. 

Born and raised in Brussels, Kento fell in love with techno at an early age. Beeing a musician in different genres since the age of six, he made a musical journey throughout which, he had a 10 year conservatory formation, learned saxophone, guitar, bass, drums, piano... and arrived at producing techno,  the musical love of his life and in 2020 he starts to produce his very first tracks. Releasing almost immediatly on ITHICA RECORDS after which he had several number 1 beatport hits in both Hardtechno and Raw/Deep genres. He started his own label in October 2021 called OSKYRTH with which he also hosts events.

Walking the line between hypnotic techno,  rave, bounce, groove, techno, tekno and psy, and on occasion pounding brutal hardtechno during his sets giving the crowd a musical experience they won't be likely to forget. Captivating the crowd from the first note, taking them in the palm of his hand and walking them through his musical universe.

A south america tour planned, and allready shared the stage with artists such as SPEEDY J, GARY  BECK, GHOST IN THE MACHINE, PROTOKSEED, KOBOSIL, 999999999, FERNANDA MARTINS, ANGY KORE, CARI LEKEBUSCH, PFIRTER, STAN CHRIST, DION, JAN VERCAUTEREN, DYEN, WNDRLST, VEL, NIOTECH, SVETEC, ANTHONY ROTHER, BLICZ, VARYA KARPOVA,...

His tracks are widely suported by artists such as CHARLOTTE DEWITTE, AMELIE LENS, PERC, NICO MORENO, KOBOSIL, AYAKO MORI, CASSIE RAPTOR, ....

name: Khardiac
bio:
Canadian-born, Dubai-dwelling DJ/producer Khardiac commands the stage with over 2 decades of electrifying performances and genre-defying sounds. Since bursting onto the scene in his early age, Khardiac has been a formidable presence, refusing to be confined by the boundaries of any single genre. With an unwavering commitment to delivering unforgettable experiences, he has become known for his ability to read any crowd and tailor his sets accordingly, whether it's igniting dancefloors with high-energy open format sets or delving into the depths of Techno, Psy-trance, house, and afro house.

Khardiac's versatility extends beyond the DJ booth to his impressive production catalog. With a creative vision that knows no bounds, he effortlessly traverses House, Techno, Psytrance, and beyond, infusing each track with his signature style and energy. Not content to simply follow trends, Khardiac has also lent his talents as a ghost producer to a diverse array of world-renowned Hip-hop & pop artists, further solidifying his status as a multifaceted musical force.

In the competitive world of electronic music, Khardiac has risen to the top, earning the support and admiration of industry heavyweights like Armin Van Buuren. His releases on esteemed labels such as SpinTwist Records, Brooklyn Fire, Nightenjin, and his inclusion on Armin Van Buuren’s ASOT 950 Official Album serve as testament to his undeniable talent and influence.

As Khardiac continues to push boundaries and defy expectations, his dynamic creations promise to captivate audiences worldwide, ensuring that his musical journey remains one of innovation, excitement, and boundless energy.

name: Khiva
bio:
D A R K D R E A M
Deep Dark & Dangerous 

Bookings: 
Contact: khivamusic@gmail.com

https://www.facebook.com/khivamusic
https://www.mixcloud.com/khiva
https://www.instagram.com/real.khiva

Honouring a deep longing to convey a passion that arises from somewhere far beneath a visible reality, Khiva attempts to bring the deep rooted to the surface.

Finding her true love within sonic sculpture and nurturing a propensity toward the emotionally fuelled and often dramatic, bass driven 140-centric styles offer a natural focal point, but in no way a limit, for her musical exports. Intricately crafting low frequency soundscapes and charging beats while fervently utilizing contrasts alongside often haunting and metaphorical lyrical stylings, she hopes to invoke a true experience in the listener.

With praised festival appearances, weighty slots alongside some of dubstep’s finest acts, successful headline shows and various international guest mixes, her intentional selections bring forth a contagious energy through lively and dynamic mixes, using the decks as a tool to channel the profound, moving and unexplainable in an experience through sound that goes much deeper than the eye can see.

Seeing a rapidly expanding tour schedule since the release of her debut EP in 2018, she has continued to push boundaries and make powerful impressions at some of bass music’s top events across the map, delivering standout sets at festivals such as Shambhala Music Festival (CA), Outlook Festival (EU), and Northern Bass (NZ). Generating undeniably impactful waves with her latest productions and compelling performances, including debuting her live vocal performance in 2019, her one of a kind sound continues to evolve and mark Khiva as a force to be reckoned with.

Embodying boundless energy, elegance, and power, Khromata is among the most internationally admired and recognized American psytrance DJs.  A label DJ for the legendary Iboga Records, she brings infectious enthusiasm, musical versatility, and technical mastery to her performances, each set a unique blend of sounds, style, and substance. 

Her musical repertoire is as wide-reaching as her global career, spanning progressive and psychedelic trance, progressive house, psydub, and psybreaks. Khromata has brought her high-energy sets to cities like San Francisco, New York, Las Vegas, Los Angeles, and Seattle, with her international appearances including Germany, the UK, Denmark, Mexico, Canada, Panama, Hungary, South Africa, and Ukraine. 

Khromata is a regular DJ for Dreamstate. She has played at some of the world's top festivals, including Ozora Festival, Electric Daisy Carnival (EDC), Boomtown Fair, Antaris Project, Love & Light, Noisily Festival, Lightning in a Bottle, Fractalfest, Tribal Gathering, Eclipse Festival Quebec, Symbiosis' Oregon Eclipse, and How Weird Street Faire. 

She has headlined shows across the world, and her reliability and versatility have made her the ideal go-to for opening sets in support of legendary artists, among them Astrix, Liquid Soul, Vini Vici, Perfect Stranger, Captain Hook, Ticon, Animato, Outsiders, Rising Dust, Emok, Pixel, GMS, Mad Maxx, Neuromotor, Gaspard, Atmos, Martin Vice, Deedrah, and more.

Her own productions and collaborations have been released on Iboga Records, Phantasm Records, Transcape Records, and Free-Spirit Records, and since 2020 she has spearheaded three compilations on Iboga Records, Psychedelic Selections Volumes 005, 006, and 007.

With her varied psychedelic spectrum of musical tastes and her vivacious energy channeled with intelligence and precision, Khromata continues to delight and thrill audiences across the globe with her engaging, uplifting, playful, and powerful presentations of the latest cutting-edge flavors of electronic dance music.

name: Kim Mathijs
bio:
It’s all about coming full circle. 

And while futureproofing has always been at the forefront of his mind, it’s worth mentioning that Kim Mathijs has been leaving indelible imprints around the Belgian electronic music spectrum for quite a while. From curating niche compilations over radio shows to breathing fresh air into festival line-ups (yes, that sublime Booth stage at Pukkelpop holds his signature). Kim is also sculpting and mentoring emerging DJ talent through DKO and the Tomorrowland Academy. 

As far as stacking up memorable moments behind the decks. Kim has been there, and he’s done it, diligently and complete with all the bells and whistles. Now it’s time to strip it all back, reconnect with his roots and elevate his long-time passion for the fundamentals. 

Think of the genres that are heavy on synths, funk, and laced with cosmic vibes. The core elements that defined the proto-house movement: italo, disco, garage, house and everything in between. No gimmicks, no blinders, only gems. 

But there’s more in Kim’s saddlebag. He won’t confine himself to just sought-after classics alone; He prefers blending timeless essentials and contemporary work. If you fancy some bigger kick drums, breaks and Jersey Club, with a detour to stripped-down techno or trance-influenced club tracks, park yourself in front of the man. He’ll be happy to deliver with an impact.

name: Kitty Amor
bio:
DJ and Producer, Kitty Amor has been working tirelessly over the years to earn her name within the underground House music scene. Specialising in Deep and African Electronic House music she has rapidly become the DJ she aspired to be all those years ago. Her musical style differs to many others with her manipulative selections and undeniable skill that leaves great impact to dance floors. With the way she connects with people through sound, Kitty was always destined to be a music supplier.

Through her mix compilations (House Es Amor & Appreciation), Kitty has continued to establish her sound in the UK, expand her fan-base and never fails to disappoint whenever/however she is heard. Following the success of these releases and delivering dynamic performances every time she graces the decks, Kitty Amor has been heavily recognised by iconic and established producers/DJs that she has always looked up to such as Black Coffee and Osunlade to name a few. Kitty Amor has supported and played alongside Atjazz, Culoe De Song, DJEFF, Roni Size, Horsemeat Disco and many more where she takes no prisoners in earning her spot on the bill. Her mark has been made internationally through performances at highly recognised festivals such as Soundwave Croatia and Nova Batida, as well as dominating stages in Ibiza, Amsterdam and Portugal. 

Heading her residency club nights Motherland and Sessions, she has taken this brand to be established in London as one of the UK’s domain for African electronic music through her ability to create an immersive experience with sound and visuals enticing and welcoming music fans of diverse taste. January 2019, Kitty Amor became the first UK DJ from the Afro House scene to play at the Printwork’s - one of London’s biggest indoor venues. In addition to this, she has built a brand partnership with fashion brand NICCE who opened their N-Studio doors to her to host special mixes and collaborate on events, as well as showcasing her talent for Lynx Music. 

Kitty Amor’s talent has been identified and respected in the house scene as a rising star that shines the brightest in the DJ booth.

name: Knock2
bio:
It’s easy to say that Richard Nakhonethap, pka knock2, is one of the biggest acts to break out of the electronic music space in 2022. After bursting onto the scene with massive collaborations like “radial” with ISOxo and “What’s The Move” with veteran Henry Fong, knock quickly captured the attention of fans around the globe. Shortly after he released the iconic bass house anthem ‘dashstar*’. With no playlisting, or support of any kind, and no shows due to covid-19, the odds were stacked against him. However, slowly but surely this record began to take on a life of its own. As shows and festivals returned, this sleeper hit began to explode. More and more support from DJ’s such as DJ Snake, Tiesto, Joyryde & more secured it the 3rd slot on this year’s EDCLV most played list.

Knock has quickly gained the reputation of having the “midas touch” when it comes to dance music. He effortlessly finds monster grooves with massive party energy, expertly towing the balance between bass and house music with a trap influence. His debut self-released ep “2HEARTs” has already been heralded as classic among fans and tastemakers alike. In addition, his massive singles “gettin’ hott” and “PARANOiD”, have also seen extensive dj support and garnered millions of plays online.

In 2022, the demand to see this energy live became palpable. Knock launched his debut headline show experience, “Room202” to a rabid sold out Los Angeles audience. A conceptual warehouse show that prioritizes massive party energy and an intimate experience over the typical high production concert that currently dominates dance music. The impact was immediate, with fans all over the globe begging for a Room 202 experience in their area. Knock was happy to oblige and took the show to San Francisco and more recently Salt Lake City; both sold out in a matter of minutes. He also embarked on his first international run to japan, where he touted another three sold out shows with frenzied energy and fans screaming the drops back to him of unreleased songs they’d heard only online. This led him to his massive “homecoming” show in San Diego, where he sold out the legendary SOMA mainstage in 24 hours.

2023 has been a landmark year for the rising star. After releasing his widely acclaimed “Room 202 EP”, which featured massive anthems such as “MAKE U SWEAT!”, and “rock ur world”, Knock took his Room 202 concept around the country for his debut headline tour. The exclusive 9 date tour was an immediate success, with all dates selling out instantly; which led to a series of venue upgrades and an additional 4 dates, which all followed suit, selling out before the tour had even started. He made his festival debut at Coachella and HITC NYC to overflowing crowds and a frenzied energy. Knock2 content was taking over everyone’s feeds on every social media platform, with fans clamoring over the unique sets and performances, begging him to come to their city or local festival.

Looking to the future, Knock is bringing his Room 202 experience to EU, selling out his London show instantly and is also performing at Lollapalooza Paris. With a mountain of anticipated ID’s, collaborations with NGHTMRE and Dillon Francis, his first festival headline slot at Imagine b2b with Dillon Francis; he’s poised to become one of the biggest figures in the space, charting his own course and breaking all the rules.

name: Kölsch
bio:
For Rune Reilly Kölsch, Kompakt has become a great label to call home. In 2013 the German imprint celebrated 20 years of record releases at the cutting edge of electronic music, championed in June by one of the most genre re-defining albums and personal music projects for an era: Kölsch’s landmark long player, ‘1977’.

A melodic autobiography on black wax, the Kölsch project has seen 36/37-year-old Rune take stock of a diverse and successful production career and draw upon his own personal beginnings: a nostalgia for childhood, family, friends and the confusion of applying his split-cultural heritage to what it means to think of ‘home’. As Rune freely admits, “being half Irish, half German and living in Denmark – it was all one big messy period of my life.” 

Born to hippie parents in the freetown of Christiania (a commune-like autonomous borough of the Danish capital Copenhagen) his childhood was spent surrounded by creativity. His mother was an artist whose family had roots in German politics and his father a singer songwriter who travelled through Asia playing music in the early 70's. Kölsch, however, did miss out on building friendships and found solace in making up “this imaginary world that I would spend days in,” before the family moved to Germany – a period of memories, relations and characters from which ‘1977’ derives its titles.

For Rune, the tracks he began building from 2010 took in this personal reflection, his being “completely locked in to reminiscing about what shaped me as a kid and into the individual that I am now” – contemplating his unique past to form the brickwork of ‘1977’, one of the most future-facing techno albums of recent years.

Influenced by hip hop, pop and the incredible legacy of Jeff Mills and Derrick May, Rune started producing in 1995, embarking on a string of success stories. In 2003 he released the multi-million selling, saxophone-infused ‘Calabria’, that saw collaboration requests pouring in from artists as diverse as Nicki Minaj, Shakira and Flo Rida. He then set up Tattoorecs – releasing pioneering underground tracks with no titles, just tattoos for artwork, that garnered critical acclaim and support from minimal and techno trailblazers such as Sven Väth, Richie Hawtin, Magda, Tiefschwarz and Ricardo Villalobos.

This appreciation of the complete musical spectrum has gifted Rune with a devotion to groove and melodics and with it the dexterity to input real creative change to the genres he reveres, not least his beloved techno. “2010 was the year of the ketamine house wave, where the music was 118 bpm and everything was extremely boring”, reflects Rune. “I wanted some melodic techno, some energy back in this scene. People needed the energy to express themselves and go crazy for a bit.”

This notion faced opposition, even from within Rune’s close circles. But it was Kompakt founder Michael Mayer who had the insight to see what Kölsch was trying to achieve. Rune’s conviction that vibrations and melodics are the key to human response had tipped the balance, underlined by his experience as a hip hop DJ where he “needed something to catch me and drag me in. And that’s what techno should do!” Here too he drew on his love of Jeff Mills and Derrick May, recalling how “they used to make mistakes all the time. It would be a big mash of all kinds of stuff, but at least something was happening. That’s what I was missing and that’s what I’m trying to change with the Kölsch project.”

The result is ‘1977’, a personal collection of dancefloor destroyers that are continuing to send clubs and festivals across the globe into melodic supernova. Take this video of Kölsch’s set at Belgium’s I Love Techno festival, one of Rune’s 2013 highlights, where “people were doing sit downs, singing along to all the tracks”. Watch it. It puts the hairs up on the back of your neck. “The response was overwhelming,” said Rune in a recent interview with Mixmag (who named Kölsch as one of their ‘Stars Of 2013’), as “when you think about it, it was just a bunch of childhood memories with a kickdrum underneath.” 

Elsewhere he’s ripped up the airways with an acclaimed Essential Mix for Pete Tong on BBC Radio 1, delivered his incendiary soundscape to Singapore’s world-renowned ZoukOut Festival, boomed his live show through the heaving basement of London’s XOYO and played the hallowed Space Terrace – in his words “a boyhood dream since I started going to Ibiza in 1999. That was what I wanted from life!” So opening Amnesia in 2014 with Joris Voorn will be a bonus then...

While these are reasons enough to keep the beaming smile beneath Kölsch’s trademark black fedora, his humility remains just as striking. While tracks like ‘Goldfisch’ have taken pivotal positions in the set lists of world class DJs from across the dance music spectrum – traversing the underground with Seth Troxler, while simultaneously providing credible new euphoric highs for the likes of Axwell – Rune remains joyously down to earth. All despite producing, with ‘1977’, an album that has crossed as many cultural and musical boundaries as his own childhood past.

From the face-twisting melodic drive of ‘Opa’ and ‘Bappedekkel’, to the chord-surfing piano groove of ‘Der Alte’ and the euphoric crescendos of ‘Lorely’, ‘Oma’ and ‘All That Matters’ (all hits in different countries), the fact remains that whether in your living room, on the dancefloors of the world’s greatest parties, or simply in your headphones on your way home, Kölsch’s ‘1977’ has re-defined techno and become an achievement that speaks for itself. 

Words: Phil Dudman – Clubs & Live Music Editor, Mixmag

name: KRESPO
bio:
Emerging from Santiago, Chile, DJ and producer KRESPO is undoubtedly making big waves in the national and international music scene. With over a million streams on his productions, KRESPO has captured the attention and support of industry giants such as James Hype, Sosa, Gabe, Matroda, Detlef, Lexlay, among others. Having performed at shows across Europe and South America, KRESPO's electrifying performances have showcased his undeniable talent and solidified his presence on the global stage.

As an international DJ, he has brought his music to some of the most important clubs in the world, including Pacha Barcelona (Spain), ParkArt in Brazil, and Clubroom in Chile, showcasing his ability to ignite any dance floor with his electrifying presence and undeniable talent.

KRESPO is establishing himself as one of the most dynamic and energetic DJs. His style is particularly notable for its use of very energetic basslines and catchy grooves, as well as his excellent sample handling.

He has released music on prominent record labels such as HUB, Material Series, Happy Techno, and Virgin Music, expanding his reach and solidifying his presence in the international scene.

With a clear vision and enormous potential, KRESPO is set to revolutionize the Tech House scene, taking his innovative sound and overwhelming energy to new heights. Without a doubt, his name will be heard louder and louder in the global electronic music scene.

name: Krewella
bio: Jahan Yousaf, Yasmine Yousaf, and Kris Trindl (aka Rain Man) formed the EDM trio Krewella in Chicago, Illinois. They got together in 2007 but didn't release their first material until 2011, when they uploaded a handful of songs — including the jagged, celebratory "Life of the Party" — to their Soundcloud page. In 2012, they self-released their first two EPs: Play Hard (June), featuring the reggae-flavored "Killin It," and Play Harder (December). The former reached number ten on Billboard's Top Dance/Electronic Albums chart. The same year, the trio became a staple of the festival circuit, including New York's Electric Zoo and Texas' Meltdown.

name: KRISS REEVE
bio:
Kriss Reeve makes tech house with a gritty, industrial edge. It is a calculated collision of underground drum grooves and the raw, distorted textures of electro influenced bass, a sound designed to bring a gritty energy back to a genre that can often feel too clean.

Hailing from the Netherlands, Kriss’s path to the stage was built from the inside out. He spent years behind the studio desk as a go-to producer and engineer, quietly shaping tracks for some of the biggest names in the scene and handling technical work for major labels. While he was helping others reach the charts, his own vision was always clear. Having told everyone since he was a kid that he’d be on stage, that childhood ambition eventually evolved into a need for total creative freedom.

The transition has been explosive. With over 15 million streams to his name and a three year consecutive streak at Tomorrowland, Kriss has rapidly moved from the studio to the global circuit. While his breakout "Bananza" cleared 6 million plays, his club weapon "I Just Wanna" proved his dancefloor authority, climbing to #15 on the Beatport Top 100. It’s a track record that has earned him the rare "all access" seal of approval from the industry, with support ranging from underground icons like Paco Osuna and Martin Ikin to global titans like Chris Lake, Dom Dolla, Fisher and Tiësto.

Whether he’s commanding a room in Amsterdam or touring internationally, Kriss approaches the booth with the discipline of an athlete. A lifelong basketball player and Lakers fan, he applies that same competitive drive to his production, constantly pushing his sound into darker, more industrial territory.

For Kriss Reeve, the formula is simple but uncompromising: keep the drums groovy and the bass dirty.

name: Kyle Cassim
bio:
Kyle Cassim is a South African Dj, Producer and Radio Producer.

He hosts undoubtedly the most sought after dance show on the national radio Station 5fm : Tuesdays 6-7pm and The Kyle Cassim Show Every Friday from 7-10pm 

Check out his production alias https://soundcloud.com/cinimin which is a Duo he has with his brother Austin Cassim

BIOGRAPHY


  
In 2014 Kyle played at the first ever ULTRA MUSIC FESTIVAL in SA; he just wrapped up his 5th consecutive ULTRA now in 2018. We all know once you go global, you go big!
Between the years 2014 to 2018, Kyle performed in Ibiza, London and The Netherlands. Opening for DJ’s the likes of Franky Rizardo, Skitzofrenix and Jeff Doubleu. Succession development at its best!
 
And then...... in 2016 Kyle’s dreams became a reality when 5fm (his favourite national radio station) offered him his very own Dance Music Show every Friday night.
A year and a half later, The Kyle Cassim show has become the weekend party starter, the viral vibe that people tune into!  His slogan “dirty, filthy, stanky house music...... you know you like it” is a brand in itself and echo’s from the lips of listeners the whole weekend long. Kyle now has three shoes on 5fm, The Ultimix (Tuesdays 6 to 7pm), The Kyle Cassim Show (Fridays 7 to 10pm) and his latest project, Cassim’s Kitchen. Here we have a private view into Kyle’s kitchen, where he dazzles our taste buds with his culinary skills and tickles our ears as we listen to the beats from his guest DJ. (yes ladies, he can cook!)
 
Kyle is inspirational; in 2015, he spoke at the Suits and Sneakers conference on following your passions and the actualisation of a dream! ( even if there are few monetary rewards )
 
“Local is Lekker” and Kyle has kept to his routes and loves playing at some of the most prestigious festivals and clubs in SA, where he has collaborated with some of the world’s biggest international DJ’s. Billy Kenny, Shapeless, Josh Butler, Robin Shultz, Cosmic Gate, Noir, Juilet Sikora, EDX, Sons of Maria, Mat.joe, Boogie Vice, Bass Kleph, Stimming, Hannah wants.... to name a few! Kyle frequently plays at Rage Festival, Wonderland, H20, Truth, Nicci Beach, Origin, as well as like minded festivals in Mozambique, Namibia, Zimbabwe and Zambia.
 
 
 
Who is Kyle cassim
 
Kyle exudes a trademark energy whilst performing. He gives his all to the process and acknowledges that “anyone can press play and mix behind decks” BUT not everyone delivers in the way that Kyle does and that is where the difference lies. He is enthusiastic about life, every element of it. He is eccentric and rambunctious and this shines through his music! His music elevates people! It makes them happy! It makes them feel something!
 
Kyle pays tribute, always, to his family! “My family is the reason I am where I am today, their support, their guidance, the values they instilled in me!” Kyle also has two remarkable, talented siblings (it must run in the family) who he is very close with. His younger brother Austin shares this same passion for music and so they established “CINIMIN” which showcases sets of their own production! (We did mention Unique!)
 
Kyle has been known to say; “As long as I have a roof over my head, good friends, family, food and the ability to perform, then that is all the happiness I need!”
 
It is safe to say, that these 6 years has seen, at large, the takeover of the SA Dance Scene by Kyle Cassim!

name: Kyle Kinch
bio:
Bookings: georgia@radiusartists.com
Mgmt: kylekinchmusic@gmail.com

Groovy. 
It is the only word that accurately describes Kyle Kinch’s music, presence, and persona. With a deep rooted obsession of jazz and disco, Kyle finesses these influences to blur the lines between house, disco, and techno. Kyle has featured releases on Gorgon City's Realm Records, Sonny Fodera’s Solotoko, Glasgow Underground, and EMI; his undeniable and uncanny sound has been felt at Ultra Music Festival, Printworks London, and numerous dancefloors across the world. 
In late 2018, Kyle linked up with powerhouse duo Gorgon City to be the first artist on their label, Realm (other than the duo themselves). The Manchester EP sparked the rise of his signature sound and gained support from heavy hitters such as Camelphat, Fisher, and David Guetta. Following this success, Kyle reached new heights by making the front page of beatport, features on Forbes, and remixing top-selling artist Duke Dumont.
With his productions powering his performances, Kyle Kinch captivates audiences on both the club and festival stages. Kyle creates a unique vibe that few can imitate. This energy brought him to the famous Brooklyn Mirage, Tobacco Dock London, Electric Daisy Carnival, and premier clubs across the US.These events included sharing the spotlight with Claude Vonstroke, Kaskade, Chris Lake, and Gorgon City. Named one of Dancing Astronaut’s “Artist to Watch in 2022”, it’s clear that everyone will experience Kyle Kinch very soon.

name: L_cio
bio:
for bookings: 
denise@atomicsoda.com.br

https://lcio.myportfolio.com/

Combined sensitivity and power is the detail that distinguishes what is only beautiful from what is really sublime in artistic creation. Laercio Schwantes aka L_cio, as an instrumentalist and sweet flute player, managed to arrive at this synthesis in an exceptional way, being one of the most fascinating exponents of Brazil. Singular as a complete author, composing and producing all his musical journeys.
Journeys that go through the instigating contrast of its rhythmic-melodic complexity with the simplicity of its being. It is celebrated by the most demanding listeners and adored by the most fervent dancefloors, being simple to understand how it stands out in festivals like Dekmantel (São Paulo), DGTL (São Paulo), Mysteryland (Chile), Les Escales (France), two editions of Time Warp Brasil and two editions of Rock in Rio, besides appearing consistently in the booths of German institutions such as Salon Zu Wilden Renate, Robert Johnson and also animating global audiences in their three appearances in the Boiler Room Brasil. We present your Live in Beijing and Shanghai in China.
The charms of his music drove him to different places and took him across Europe, reaching countries like France, Malta, Lithuania and the catalog of labels like DOC, Soul Clap, Live At Robert Johnson, Perlon, Exploited, Steyoyoke, Get Physical , Archipel (Canada) and Mamba Negra Records (Mambarec) as well as helped him to profoundly transform the independent scene that nurtured him and explore the city that created him.
He had the privilege of being the only artist to make a remix authorized by Chico Buarque, an icon of Brazilian popular music. The work: “Construction 1971”. In 2018, he released his
1st album on D.O.C Records, entitled “Poema”, considered one of the albums of the year by Bravo magazine.
In his native São Paulo, L_cio is the centerpiece of the local scene, a well-known supporter of street culture, resident of innovative urban organizations such as Carlos Capslock, promoter of equality and universal access to culture. He is also the creator and curator of Akt (Party focused on Live Acts). Together with Tessuto he is the owner of the MEMNTGN records distributed by Kompakt. Tireless not only in a fruitful musical activity, but in the dissemination and promotion of the best values that it contains.
During this journey, he established partnerships (collaborations and remixes) with producers such as Patrice Baumel, Portable, Francesco Tristano, Nicola Cruz, Joyce Muniz, Blancah, Wehbba. In addition to the Techno circuit, L_cio also produced, remixed and collaborated with artists such as Lia Paris, Pablo Vittar, Filipe Massumi and André Nardi and was a member and founder of Teto Preto band.
And it is for such factors, among many others, that it is impossible not to be enchanted when we follow a career as solidly promising as his, in which artistic evolution and development are so closely intertwined. Or better yet, be part of it.

name: Lange
bio:
Lange is recognised as one of the most influential dance artists of the past two decades; as well as helping to define the trance genre in his early career, he is also a DJ who has remained at the forefront of the scene and a producer that has continued to push boundaries. After an exhausting list of achievements, counting among them 20 UK top 40s, featuring on film soundtracks, and remixing mainstream artists such as The Pet Shop Boys and Faithless, Lange remains one of the world's leading EDM producers.

Alongside his exceptional and successful studio work, he is a prolific international DJ, making appearances for some of the best club brands in the world including Insomniac and Cream as well as performing for prestigious events such as such as Tomorrowland, EDC, Dreamstate, Sziget and ASOT - marked by a sustained appearance in the influential Top 100 DJ Poll for 8 years. His eclectic, stimulating, and driving sets pull influences from across the dance music spectrum from trance, progressive, techno and electro.

name: Laolu
bio:
Powered by GigaTools

Laolu (Innervisions / Freude Am Tanzen, CH) 

Released on Innervisions at the end of 2015, Laolu's remix of Dele Sosimi's 'Too Much Information' has been a number one hit and Dixon and Âme's favourite track of the year. Laolu was born out of the love of a Nigerian father and a Swiss mother who, most appropriately, met in record store in Berlin. He spent his first years in Nigeria where his parents owned "The Gallery", a club dedicated to Jazz and Soul. And so began his musical education. After relocating to France , he attended music school in order to learn saxophone and music theory, but upon discovering Detroit techno pioneers Derrick May and Carl Craig at the age of 18, he sold his saxophone to buy his first drum machine. 
He then moved to Geneva where he started DJing and met Kadebostan who quickly became a musical co-conspirator in the studio and as a DJ partner in their "Caracas Club". In 2010, Laolu released his first EP "O Fantasma" on the young Berlin based label Clap Your Hands. A deep tune for special club moments that has gained attention from DJs like Osunlade or Ruede Hagelstein. During the following years, his collaborations and solo work have led him to produce music for labels including Innervisions, Freude Am Tanzen, Clap Your Hands, Mental Groove, Fenou, Baobab Music and Blooming Soul Records. He kicked off 2014 writing and producing Sene Kela for Mr Raoul K new album, which gathered love and support from Dixon, Mano Le tough or Adriatique. 
As a DJ, he has built a solid reputation in his hometown of Geneva but also played across Europe in Berlin, Paris , Krakow and Tbilisi. Ruff techno, heart warming house, his style both sophisticated and raw at once allows him to swing moods and match the feverish atmosphere of any club.

name: LAURA HOOGLAND
bio:
From an early age, Laura was influenced by her father’s musical talent. She developed a strong technical vision of music and learned to share this passion through music by her own compositions on the piano.

In 2022, Laura got to open the Extrema Outdoor mainstage (Printworks). Subsequently, she graced prestigious events including Secret Garden, Amsterdam Dance Event,Tomorrowland (the crystal garden), Area V, and Bloq events, where she currently holds residency.

Following electrifying performances warming up for esteemed DJs like Joseph Capriati, Massano, Adana Twins, Patrice Baümel, Axel Haube, Âme & Dixon, Woo York, among others, Laura showcased her talent on platforms such asIbiza Global Radio, Techno Dampfer (Dusseldorf), and Darkroom (Slovakia), captivating audiences across Europe.

Enthralled by the mesmerizing fusion of rhythm and sound, Laura embarked on a mission to share her musical journey. She founded the Belgium DJ School, where she mentors aspiring talents, nurturing their skills and guiding them into the music industry. Her motto is: “Rise up by lifting others.”

With her signature blend of melodic techno and eclectic influences, Laura possesses an innate ability to ignite the crowd's fervor. Now, this young DJ stands poised to expand her horizons and spread her wings.

With performances at Tomorrowland, Ultra, EDC, Sziget, Red Rocks and
Ushuaïa Ibiza, and recognition from 1001Tracklists as “The Future of
Dance”, Laura van Dam is emerging as one of the most exciting new
names in electronic music. Her global following and more than 36 million
streams across Spotify and YouTube underline a sound that connects
with audiences worldwide.
Laura represents the new wave of techno and trance. She is not chasing
trends but carving her own path, blending melodic depth with energy to
create a style that is powerful, timeless, and distinctly her own.
With past releases on Armada Music and Insomniac, she has built
credibility with respected labels while curating her own platform through
Capture Radio. Her mission is to inspire: create music that brings people
together, sparks magic, and leaves them believing in their own potential.

BUY/ STREAM ↓↓↓↓
http://enhncd.co/leenapunks-inthenight
https://leenapunks.komi.io/

Since her emergence in 2020, Leena Punks has built a dedicated global following with a raw, high-impact take on house, techno and breaks, deeply rooted in UK rave culture. The Greece-raised, London-based producer is soaring on a hot streak of high-profile accolades. She’s received heavy support from notable DJs across a wide spectrum of genres including Armin Van Buuren, Korolova, Meduza, Vintage Culture, Gorgon City and James Hype, with dance pioneers Faithless performing her Dawn Of The Dead edit live across their 2024 & 2025 global tour. 

A regular fixture in the Beatport top 10, topping the Breakbeat Chart three times, Leena has garnered international radio support from the likes of Sirius XM, Kiss FM, NRJ, Slam!, and Radio 538, with a plethora of support across BBC Radio One including two ‘Hottest Records’ within the space of 6 months, BBC Introducing’s ‘One To Watch’, ‘Spotlight Artist Of The Week’, and two Jaguar ‘Dancefloor Moments’.

Leena has graced the decks of some of the most prestigious properties in the electronic space including Creamfields, Tomorrowland, Dreamstate, Brooklyn Mirage, London fabric, Printworks, Here at Outernet, LA Sound and The Concourse Project. Her 2026 touring schedule includes her own ‘Hestēa’ night at London’s E1. Leena’s artistry continues to evolve and with some extremely exciting musical projects on the horizon her upward trajectory is set to continue.

name: LEMAKUHLAR
bio: Lemakuhlar are two friends locked into music. There are no rules, there is only intuition and love for all things musical. Both live and Stijn Verheyden as a DJ they succeed in being both experimental and direct, perfectly balancing groove, darkness and light. Their sound is their very own, in which live elements can sound like they were programmed, and programmed sounds can sound like they are played live. Their secret is musicality and an eye and ear for minute details, making a Lemakuhlar groove something that is unique and instantly recognizable. A rare thing in nowadays glut of sample-packed run of the mill dance music. A thing to cherish, get down to, make love to…on repeat.

name: Lil Baby
bio:
https://www.whamtour.com/

Some artists define a genre, but Lil Baby defines a generation. The GRAMMY Award-winning rapper has smashed records, made history, and impacted the course of modern hip-hop with his instantly identifiable and inimitable style. He has garnered dozens of multi platinum certifications and tens of billions of streams as arguably the biggest new rapper to emerge this decade. Following the success of his platinum full-length debut Harder Than Ever in 2018, he seized #1 on the Billboard Top 200 with 2020’s My Turn, becoming “the year’s #1 selling and #1 streaming album in the US.” At first, it cemented him as “2020’s first and only artist to go double-platinum,” but it has since gone quadruple-platinum and has logged 85 weeks in the top 10 of the Top R&B/Hip-Hop Albums chart – marking the longest top-tier run in the chart’s history. 

 

He notably tied Prince and Paul McCartney for Billboard Hot 100 hits and Taylor Swift for “most weeks atop the Billboard Top 200 in 2020” with a total of 6. Out of eight nominations, he scored his first GRAMMY® Award in 2022. He has appeared on the covers of Rolling Stone and the Billboard R&B/Hip-Hop Power Players Issue in addition to receiving honors from VEVO, Rap Caviar, the Apple Music Awards, and more. He teamed up with Lil Durk for The Voice of the Heroes, marking his second #1 debut on the Billboard Top 200. It’s just the beginning though. He’s bound to revolutionize the culture again with his third album in 2022. Most recently, he released “Right On” and “In A Minute” which both songs debuted on Billboard’s Hot 100 chart. This feat puts Lil Baby in rare territory, making him the youngest of only 12 artists to have ever landed 100 or more songs on the Hot 100. This generation belongs to Lil Baby.

name: Lil Uzi Vert
bio:
Over the course of their illustrious career, the multiple GRAMMY-nominated and RIAA Diamond-certified superstar has amassed over 31 billion career streams, cementing their status as a global icon.

UZI has released an array of critically acclaimed albums, three of which have reached No. 1 on the Billboard 200 charts. The superstar has earned over 100 placements on the Billboard Hot 100 charts, including signature hits such as the Diamond-certified single "XO TOUR Llif3," “Just Wanna Rock,” “Futsal Shuffle 2020” and “That Way,” among many others.

UZI’s unparalleled ability to blend genres has earned them a loyal fan base and a spot among the most innovative artists of this generation. Their catalog includes multiple platinum and gold-certified tracks, including The Way Life Goes and Neon Guts (feat. Pharrell Williams), along with the highly successful collaborative project PLUTO X BABY PLUTO with Future. Additionally, UZI’s involvement in Migos' hit single “Bad and Boujee” further solidified their reputation for shaping chart-topping collaborations.

name: Lina K
bio:
If you've ever been clubbing in Shanghai, you've probably come across a fierce blonde during her late-night extended sets, keeping everyone from going home With a DJ career spanning more than a decade, she has established herself as one of the most prominent figures in China’s underground scene, whether through running her club night Techno Train or being actively involved in various clubs across Shanghai. As the founder of Techno Train, she shaped Shanghai’s techno culture, introducing international talent and fresh, innovative sounds to local audiences.
Her project, Techno Is A Woman, has broken barriers, amplifying the voices of women and marginalized communities in an industry still dominated by men.With a bold and eclectic style that fuses techno, breakbeat, electro, and Detroit influences, Lina is known for her dynamic performances.
Whether in intimate settings or on the biggest stages, her versatility and passion for music make her a standout artist.

name: Liquid Soul
bio:
http://www.instagram.com/liquidsoul_official
http://www.facebook.com/liquidsouliboga

Nicola Capobianco, a Swiss born producer and DJ who is better known for his project called LIQUID SOUL.
Falling in love with electronic music from a very young age, he almost immediately took an interest in DJ’ing back in 1993, this is the very year where his journey into the world of music officially begun. It became clear that his new found passion wasn’t just a passing phase and would last as he made the decision to venture deeper into music. This quickly saw him find his way around the studio as this was the next phase of his progression. He started crafting himself a unique sound signature. This hugely assisted his career and has helped sustain his constant heavy flow of bookings all over the world, ranging from clubs to festivals and big raves.
Shortly after 2001 Nicola discovered the psychedelic side of trance music. He felt the urge to again explore new avenues within himself. This reinvention process gave birth to his current and popular project, LIQUID SOUL. He played a vital role and was one of the pioneers in shaping the Psychedelic Progressive Trance landscape to where it has grown today. LIQUID SOUL became a worldwide sensation for his productions and his distinctive sound signature. A sound that can be best described as masterfully capturing emotion through the perfect use of uplifting melodies which manages to intelligently fuse into Psychedelic Trance. These unique qualities have simply set LIQUID SOUL apart from the pack, making him one of the most requested artists in the business today.
The LIQUID SOUL project rapidly gained its own momentum, and was instantly approached with an exclusive record label deal from IBOGA Records, (the most successful Psy- Progressive-Trance label). LIQUID SOUL became the labels biggest selling artist over the past decade. He released his debut album «Synthetic Vibes», that descended onto the world with huge success, followed by three chart topping albums «Love in Stereo», «Cocktails» and «Revolution» which again were masterpieces. This also included countless hypnotic releases featuring several remixes as well as a host of various artist compilations like
«Streetparade 2018» – the official compilation of the world’s biggest party. Other very impressive career highlights include winning the acclaimed
«DJ Awards» in Ibiza for the Psy-Trance category, furthermore he won three Beatport awards: twice for the «Best Track» and once for the prestigious «Best Artist» award. Finally toping things off, he very comfortably still holds the most number 1 releases within the Psy- Trance category on Beatport, which again speaks for itself.
To connect even closer to the psy-trance scene Nicola recently established «Psy-Nation Radio» together with Ace Ventura – a monthly podcast with the freshest psy-trance music, insights and interviews. With tens of thousands monthly listeners «Psy-Nation Radio» is another successful project to shape and impact the psychedelic music scene. With such an impressive track record and dynamic career it makes complete sense why LIQUID SOUL has presently become one of the highest booked and most in demand artists. With over 100 performances annually, ranging from Festivals, Shows and Clubs such as Boom, Ozora, Tomorrowland, EDC, Ministry of Sound, Dreamstate and A State of Trance to mention a few. The future surrounding this talented artist is certainly going places, so get strapped in as the ride has only just begun.

name: Liwaa
bio:
Liwaa is a rising talent in the UAE's DJ scene, known for his residency at Iris since 2019. Over the years, he has performed alongside renowned artists such as Stephan Bodzin, Carlita, DJ Tennis, Birds of Mind, Adriatique, Mind Against, Blond:ish, Patrice Bäumel, Claptone, Sébastien Léger, Roy Rosenfeld, and more, solidifying his reputation as a dynamic and versatile DJ.

Liwaa's unique blend of oriental and house genres has resulted in a signature sound that sets him apart from his peers. His passion for electronic, house, and techno music is evident in his vast collection of records, which he uses to curate unforgettable sets that keep dance floors packed and energized.

Liwaa's international travels have taken him to some of the world's most famous music events, including Ultra, DGTL, ADE, Melt, Music on, and Sunwaves, inspiring him to share his music with a global audience.

With a focus on forward-thinking electronic music, Liwaa's talent is poised to ignite dance floors. His artistry brings people together through the universal language of music, much like painting, drawing, sculpture, or poetry.

name: Los Mirlos
bio:
A group that disseminates music and culture of the Peruvian Amazon. Created in Lima in 1973, but its true origin was in Moyobamba, city where the members of the group met.

Considered one of the pioneers of the Amazonian Cumbia, Los Mirlos travel the world after 45 years with pride to make known the sound of the jungle in Peru and the world.

Currently have managed to be recognized as references of the tropical Amazonian genre, reaching a young audience eager to hear new nuances and sounds... discovering in the Psychedelic Amazonian Cumbia the root of this movement, which we are proud to represent.

name: LOS REFRESCOS
bio:
THE REFRESHMENTS 
or the mystique of gozadera (big time enjoyment) 
1. Refreshment: 
cold beverage/ enjoyment of drinks and candy

Let’s imagine a sun drenched terrace. A hot summer. Let’s imagine a certain time of the day in which the temperature and the ideal light are settling above all things and all bodies. On one side is Argenis, The Claw; on the other is Martin, The Hook. It is not a battle or a duel. Everybody seeks for their own pace and experiments with their instruments. They get prepared and go ahead. Coupled, connected. It is impossible to remain sitted. They have already announced it in one of their songs: “The Hook & The Claw have loosened the ropes, beware girl, these two are to be feared”... Here come The Refreshments to make you dance. Where do they come from? Both are Latino. They are both European. They are, in short, from almost everywhere. They are musicians. Also producers. They are a reference. But mostly, they are enjoyers. 

2. To refresh: 
to moderate or decrease the heat/ to renew/ to take strength, vigor or courage.

They ran into each other in New York in 1996. It was the time of Gonzalo Martinez and His Thinking Congas, of which them two were also craftsmen. After touring world, studios, clubs, discos, for our own joy and contentment, The Hook & The Claw have finally decided to get ahead with The Refreshments, the project they had devised ever since they first met and recognized each other as peers. Because, as they specify: "In it it’s possible to achieve an intuitive development of new musical strategies as well as an effective way to work with other musicians." 

They tell us The World is Getting Warmer, as their debut album is called. And warn us: "After the failure of humanity about the use and control of the forces of the universe, which have turned against us, it’s urgent that we nurture ourselves with another kind of energy." And their music confirms to all of us, those who are dancing on this side, that they’ve come not just to renew a musical style or swell the latinotronic lists, a developing genre that, paradoxically, they themselves initiated, but rather to refresh a way of being on this planet.
Fresh (from germanic frisk: new, agile) 
just made or harvested/ well rested/ shameless. 
Freshly harvested and shameless. That’s the way the thirteen songs they have composed are. Plagued by insolence and cheeky audacity (Was not a moto, was not a photo, what I wanted was to grab your...), but also dotted with wisdom (Better to get fooled than to be distrustful), with a very special, joyful, mystical spirit. With a hyper-concentrated energy that can leave nobody cold. 
All of this is what the happy gathering of two of the most recognized artists in electronic music today brings along. An association, or rather, a brotherhood, that has been cooking for three years of conversations and meetings, and which became a reality in Martin´s studio in France, very near Geneva, by the lake. They count already two years of working and recording together, and for that time some privileged public has already been able to see and hear them play in Geneva, Zurich, Bern, Oslo, Berlin and Paris. 
Lola Larra, Oct. 2014

bio:
Lostly (André Frauenstein) is a South African–German trance producer and DJ active since 2009. His sound blends driving rhythms, euphoric melodies, and a deep-rooted connection to acid trance, a foundation that continues to shape his modern productions.

He has collaborated with leading names including Paul van Dyk and Aly & Fila, and has earned a reputation for consistently delivering records that resonate worldwide, with the majority of his releases charting across major trance platforms.

From China to America, Lostly has performed at major international events including EDC Las Vegas, mainstage appearances at Dreamstate, Luminosity Beach Festival, and Love Parade. His sets balance peak-time intensity with the raw spirit of his acid roots, reflecting both his heritage and forward momentum.

name: Louis Millne
bio:
🌍bookings: nicole@cumacbookings.com

Louis Millne is a UK-based DJ and producer whose groove-driven, club-focused sound has become a consistent presence within the underground electronic scene. Known for balancing energy with restraint, his productions are built with the dancefloor firmly in mind and are regularly championed by some of the scene’s most influential selectors.

Following a strong run of releases throughout 2024 and 2025 on labels including Sola, Issues, Take Notes Trax and Short Circuit, Louis established himself as a reliable name within the modern underground. During this period, his music received support from artists such as Jamie Jones, Joseph Capriati and Paco Osuna, while a collaboration with Alex Culross was awarded Arielle Free’s BBC Radio 1 Big Whopper. He was also hand-picked as one of Elrow’s Top 10 Up and Coming Artists, further cementing his growing profile.

At the end of 2025, Louis released Second Guessing on Dosmundos, his most impactful record to date. The track earned widespread support from Jamie Jones, Joseph Capriati, East End Dubs, Max Dean, ALISHA, Obskur, Skream and more, and reached #3 in the Beatport Deep / Minimal Singles Chart, marking a defining moment in his catalogue.

Louis’ 2026 output continues with Touched, released on Take Notes and accompanied by a remix from label owner Mahony. The record debuted as the #1 Minimal / Deep Tech release on Beatport, further underlining his growing momentum. Further releases are scheduled on Repopulate Mars and Moan, continuing a focused and increasingly international release run.

Alongside his studio output, Louis has performed across the UK and Europe, appearing at leading parties and festivals including CIRCUS, Creamfields, ABODE and Kaluki, alongside shows in Ibiza, Romania, the Netherlands and Malta. His DJ sets reflect the same control and groove that define his productions - functional, energetic and built for long-form dancefloors.

As 2026 unfolds, Louis Millne continues to build momentum through a refined sound, a consistent release schedule and growing international presence, positioning himself as a credible and forward-moving figure within the underground.

name: Luccio
bio:
Born in Miami, Florida Raised in Cali, Colombia , Started his career in the early 2000's as a DJ. At an early age he was Influenced by names such as Tiesto, Carl Cox, Deep Dish, Paul van Dyk, Mauro Picotto & System F

In the Early 2000's he started doing small events with his high school friends
at local warehouses, where it was a tough like everything in the beginning specially in a world where hip hop dominated and it was very difficult to break thru in world that Electronic Music / Raves were affiliated with nothing hardcore drugs & an usual lifestyle.

Through out the years He has touch the hearts & ears of thousands playing at the best venues & festivals in Florida, also he has gain the support, love & respect by many people in the industry that have given him the trust and opportunity to be resident at numerous venues & festivals in the state.

Also performed in numerous Clubs, Events & Festivals like:
Electric Daisy Carnival, Ultra Music Festival, Okeechobee arts & Music Festival, Esscalation Music Festival, Sunset Music Festival, Rapture Music Festival, Groove Cruise Miami / California, Life in Color + has held residencies at the iconic venues in Miami: Club Space, Treehouse, Nocturnal , Heart Nightclub, Area51/Mekka.

Luccio also had the pleasure to perform along side heavy weights like:
Armin Van Buuren, Ferry Corsten, Paul van dyk, Gareth Emery, Aly & Fila, Dirty South, Steve Angello + the list goes on & on.

The journey continues...


Achievements
Ultra Music Festival Dj Contest in 2005 

The Festival Edition Radio aired in 7 different countries from 2006 - 2013

French DJ-producer LUCYE is for sure one of the uprising talents in the underground scene. Based in Grenoble, she has been empowered by the legendary KIKO, one of the pioneers of electronic music in France. After a few tracks signed to famous label like Watergate & Family Piknik Music, LUCYE has started touring a lot, sharing big festival stages like Les Plages Electroniques, Green Fest, Family Piknik and Tomorrowland in Belgium. Growing fast, her DJ profile is quiet unique in the electronic landscape, as her various musical influences lead her to deliver distinctive performances, from Indie Dance to Melodic Techno, through a large scale of electronic sub-genres. With a real passion for dancefloors, LUCYE knows how to build an exciting mix, especially since she’s shared the stage with masters like Solomun, Popof and many other headliners. With fresh music in her pipeline, LUCYE is now ready for new experiences, fasten your belts and get ready for take off.

name: Lukas Firtzer
bio:
Antwerp based techno producer/DJ

Releases on Exhale, Suara, Fabric, Maison Close, Complexed Records, Tabulat, Physical Techno

Fuelled by a relentless passion for his craft, Lukas Firtzer honed his skills behind the decks, channeling the raw dark energy of the underground into his own distinctive sound. Blending thunderous percussion, haunting melodies, screaming acid basslines and industrial textures, he crafts sets that transport listeners to the darkest corners of their subconscious. His electrifying performances have taken him from intimate underground venues like Anomalie, Kompass Klub and Club Vaag to prestigious festivals such as Tomorrowland and Extrema Outdoor.

Beyond the DJ booth, Lukas Firtzer is also a prolific producer, crafting original tracks that have garnered acclaim from industry tastemakers and fans alike. With a string of releases on top labels like Exhale and Suara, Lukas Firtzer continues to push the boundaries of electronic music, pushing the scene forward with his innovative approach and unwavering passion.

As he continues to carve out his place in the global dance music landscape, Lukas Firtzer remains dedicated to spreading joy and inspiration through his music, reminding audiences around the world of the transformative power of sound.

name: M.A.N.D.Y.
bio:
Berlin based label-owner, DJ, producer and Promoter.
Best known for the track "Body Language" and the remake of Laurie Andersons "O Superman". Bodmer and his former band partner Philipp Jung, along with DJ T. and Booka Shade are the founders of Get Physical, which became one of the most popular dance labels in the world. M.A.N.D.Y. subsequently provided mixes for other labels, including „At the Controls“,  „Fabric“ and „Renaissance“. Following collaborations with Bob Moses, and Dubspeeka, as well as remixes for Roxy Music, Röyskopp, The Knife and Underworld to name just a few. The long-awaited debut artist album Double Fantasy was released, incl. collaborations with the iconic Jungle Brothers and the classical and experimental pianist Francesco Tristano . 2018 signaled the beginning of a new era for M.A.N.D.Y, since Patrick Bodmer will continue to fly the flag under M.A.N.D.Y. without his former partner and childhood friend Philipp Jung, who started his solo project „Forever Jung“.

name: Mad Maxx
bio:
Max Peterson has been performing and releasing his unique brand of trance music under various project names since 1998. Max was born in San Diego, California in 1979, and spent most of his teenage years in France. He then developed his production and performance skills in California, Mexico, Spain, and every part of the planet with a vibrant trance scene.

Max’s passion for music began at a young age. Max’s father Gary Peterson is a highly accomplished composer, guitarist, and keyboard player. Gary was a member of influential 60’s-70’s cult band “Formerly Fat Harry”. His band played next to legends such as Pink Floyd, Roy Harper, Third ear band, King Crimson, Fleetwood mac, to name a few… Max’s first tracks were recorded and produced by Gary when Max was just 14 years old.

Upon moving to the U.S., Maxx joined the pioneering trance music collective and record store – The Ion Exchange in Santa Cruz - as co-owner and resident DJ. Maxx moved onto DJ’ing in San Francisco, playing for all the Bay Area's trance venues including the trance collective CCC. He also performed at all the underground warehouse and outdoor events in Northern California. Max quickly gained respect for his stomping deep psychedelic sets. At this time he also toured Canada and other cities in the USA.

In 2000, Max formed the seminal San Francisco trance project BIODEGRADABLE with Samy Guediche of CPU, and Nicolas Oesch of Mekkanikka. In 2001, they released their album Phaser which received great success at the time in the psychedelic scene and became a springboard for all members to launch their successful solo projects.

In 2001, Max joined up with Davina Elmosnino and formed the trance project Sirius Isness. Sirius Isness went on to release more than 150 tracks on prestigious trance labels. Sirius releases 3 full length albums “Resolution of Duality, Breaking the Matrix , Trancefusion” and 1 compilation. The first album was released on Moon Spirits records in 2004, the second on Mind Control Records in 2005, and the third was released in 2006 on Phantasm records, accompanied by their compilation, Mind Your Own Isness. Sirius Isness has traveled to almost every country where trance parties happen. Their most popular destinations are Japan, Brazil, Mexico, Portugal, Greece, Australia to name a few.

Max, then started in his solo project in 2007- MAD MAXX- the result of years of hard work, perfecting a unique sound, embodying all the travels, experiences and parties of the past 14 years. The music is a mix of trance, ethnic and deep sounds, with a strong kick and ominous bass line, an electro touch, emotional chants, and at times nostalgic atmospheres, with a BPM ranging from 140 to 145 in general. All of this sonic mayhem delivered in a whirlwind of psychedelia of course....

MAD MAXX has been delivering his live set to all trance freaks in the world on a weekly basis, and has collaborated with numerous artists…including JOHN 00 FLEMING, PIXEL, AVALON, MENOG, TRISTAN,  SPACE TRIBE, GMS, PAINKILLER , POLI, XSI , MASSIVE, S-RANGE, MADNETIC, PUZZLE, PUREPRESSURE, VOYAGER (aka Altom), BIO-GENESIS, MAD HATTER, AUDIO X, BIONIX, MEKKANIKKA , DIGITAL TALK, JOHN PHANTASM, AUDIO HIJACK and more....

The first MAD MAXX album "AFTERWORLD", was released beginning of May 2008 on PHANTASM records! The new MAD MAXX album was released in June 2011 on his new label, UNITED BEATS RECORDS. MAD MAXX 3rd album is coming in 2019….

Be ready for another mystical journey into the inner self...

Maddy O'Neal's music embodies a rich tapestry of genres, seamlessly blending elements from across the spectrum. Her sound, characterized by lush textures and atmospheric layers, draws heavily from her roots in funk and soul. These influences meld with deep bass frequencies and innovative synth designs, creating a unique sonic space within the electro-soul and bass music communities. Based in Denver, Colorado, Maddy has carved out her distinct niche, infusing her productions with a signature blend of soulful melodies, driving basslines, and glitchy hip-hop rhythms.


As a self-taught producer and DJ with a creatively charged background, Maddy's live performances are dynamic and immersive. She crafts a narrative journey through her sets, mixing original compositions with drum pad sequences and diverse tracks ranging from gritty, low-end bangers to shimmering, mid-tempo vocal bass and head-nodding disco beats. Her relentless touring schedule, boasting numerous shows annually for the past five years, Maddy showcases her unstoppable momentum and ability to energize audiences nationwide.
