name: Maduk
bio:
The pseudonym of Dutch producer Mark van der Schoot (32), Maduk first came to prominence via the YouTube channel Liquicity Drum & Bass  in 2011. Van der Schoot had started producing just a year before and had given his friend Maris Goudzwaard -- who ran Liquicity -- a copy of the track "Avalon" which was promptly uploaded. The liquid drum & bass sound was the perfect fit for the burgeoning channel and was released on their new label of the same name. 

Joining forces with Goudzwaard in 2013 to setup the label and their Amsterdam-based club nights, Van der Schoot continued to release on Liquicity and multiple other labels. With his brand of Drum & Bass becoming popular and winning both best newcomer DJ and Producer at the Drum&Bass Awards 2014 & 2015, Maduk released his debut album "Never Give Up” on U.K.-based label Hospital Records in 2016. 

The years after the album release Maduk focussed mainly on his label and events, Liquicity Festival now is one of the biggest Drum & Bass festivals in the world and the Liquicity community is steadily growing with sold out club shows all over Europe. Early 2019 Maduk announced to be back on the Liquicity roster and released his first new album single Go / Coming Down soon after. Later the singles Go Home (NCS), Colours / Still In Love [UKF10 x Liquicity], Company, Everytime, Back To Life, Go Back To The Jungle and Come Back To Me' followed, possibly all part of his second studio album. ~ Rich Wilson, Rovi

name: magda
bio:
Magda is amongst the most high-profile and in demand artists, having proven herself as a consistent, adventurous and exceptional performer, with a knack for bringing music together in unexpected ways.
Magda's realm as an artist pans far beyond the typical role of DJ and producer. With an open mind, Magda will try her hand at whatever feels right – from music technology collaborations and events to producing premium Tequila - creating a truly unique, multifaceted expression of herself.
Born in Poland and raised in Detroit, Magda discovered beauty and inspiration in Detroit’s raw urban landscape. In 1998, she joined the Minus label and began touring as Richie Hawtin's main DJ.
Since her first international tour in 2003, Magda established herself globally as an artist known for pushing musical boundaries and expressing her unique style. She released her forward-thinking DJ mix album 'She's A Dancing Machine' in 2006, followed by her debut artist album ‘From The Fallen Page’ in 2010 among other single releases. Magda’s remix work includes Plastikman and Depeche Mode and DJ mix albums for Fabric, Balance, as well as a BBC Radio 1 Essential Mix, among others.
In 2006, Magda established the Items & Things label and booking agency with Troy Pierce and Marc Houle.
In 2017, she launched the Perm event series in Berlin. Sitting pretty at the crossroads between art and club culture, Perm was a collective initiated by Magda and established in the name of artistic cross-pollination with a very strong multimedia aesthetic. Guests included Atom TM, Burnt Friedman, Jan Jelinek, and Cristian Vogel.
Recently, Magda has produced and performed alongside T.B. Arthur as Blotter Trax. The Blotter Trax live show combines modular synthesis, live improvisation and rhythmic exploration. Performance highlights have included live audio- visual duets with video artist Lillevan (Morton Subotnick, Christian Fennesz) and a recent club tour of Japan which saw the duo performing live and transitioning into Magda’s signature DJ sets.

name: Magdalena
bio:
In the pulsating heart of Hamburg's vibrant music setting emerges Magdalena, a force to be reckoned with in the electronic music realm. With an unparalleled ability to weave through Indie Dance and Melodic Techno, Magdalena's sonic landscape is both distinct and ethereal.

Magdalena, with her distinctive sound, is an influential figure in the electronic music scene, showcasing her versatile productions on renowned labels such as Renaissance Records, Warung Recordings, Bedrock Records, Overload Records, Blu Fin Records, Broken Mind Recordings, Anjunadeep, Timeless Moment, Rebellion, and Diynamic Music.

With the world as her muse, we can anticipate new releases mirroring the vibrant landscapes and cultures she's encountered during her journeys. From the emotive landscapes of Melodic to the rhythmic beats of Indie Dance, Magdalena's ability to connect with audiences worldwide is a testament to her artistry. 

Magdalena's international presence is truly remarkable, having graced renowned clubs and venues around the globe. Her performances include iconic destinations like Carl Cox’s Brooklyn Mirage event, Teksupport, Afterlife, Resistance, Ultra Miami, Miami Space, Watergate, Boiler Room, Cercle, Tomorrowland, Ibiza's Pacha and Amnesia, Watergate Berlin, as well as participation in major festivals worldwide such as Melt, Tomorrowland, and Sonus Festival.

bio:
Maite Dedecker (20) from Bree, Belgium, is a techno DJ with a clear artistic vision and a rapidly growing national and international presence within the electronic music scene.

Her sound is defined by powerful peak-time techno, tight grooves, and subtle acid elements, enriched with influences from psytrance, retro sounds, and Eastern vocal textures. This fusion results in dynamic, technically refined sets. Maite draws inspiration from artists such as Charlotte de Witte, Patrick Mason, Marie Vaunt, Joyhauser…

Her musical journey began at a young age, strongly influenced by her father, who was active as a DJ. Before breaking through in the music scene, Maite pursued a professional dance education at the Royal Ballet School of Antwerp and the Brussels International Ballet School. Following an injury, she shifted her focus entirely to music, further developing her artistic expression.

Maite has performed at renowned festivals and stages such as Tomorrowland, Ostend Beach, and the Lokerse Feesten, as well as in leading clubs including Vaag, Kompass Klub, and Garage Club. In addition, she has released music on international labels such as Black Hole Recordings and Kurai Records (Marie Vaunt’s label), as well as on the legendary Belgian label Bonzai Records.

Keep your eyes on Maite Dedecker.

INSTAGRAM: @maitededecker
SPOTIFY: @Maite Dedecker

name: Maiti Merlino
bio:
Maria Martina Merlino (Maiti Merlino) (1996) comenzó su carrera como DJ y Productora en el
año 2012. Siguiendo desde muy chica la música logró obtener un estilo propio definido por un
groove profundo y energético, fusionando lo mejor del House y el Minimal Deep Tech. Sus sets y
producciones destacan por su capacidad de crear experiencias sonoras envolventes, donde se
combinan melodías cautivadoras, líneas de graves contundentes y percusiones precisas,
reflejando su pasión por el ritmo y la conexión con la pista de baile.
Desde su formación a la fecha, ha participado en varias de las fiestas Under de Buenos Aires e
incluso produciendo sus propias fiestas en Buenos Aires, entre ellas Groowin, con la
participación de IGLESIAS (solid grooves) en el club llamado Moscu, ex Pacha Buenos Aires. La
versatilidad en sus sets, su personalidad y su conexión con la pista la ha llevado también a
participar en los grandes clubes y festivales de la ciudad y sus alrededores como Creamfields,
Crobar, La Estación Córdoba, Niceto Club, Mandarine, Rio Electronic Music, Jet, AMK, entre
otros compartiendo cabina y eventos con artistas Internacionales como Hector Couto,
Cuartero, Dimmish, Fatboy Slim, Hosh, Guy Gerber, Santé, Peggy Gou, Edu Imbernon, Rafa
Barrios, DJ Sneak, Pornbugs, Los Suruba, Gorge, y grandes referentes nacionales como Manu
Desrets, Londonground, Nacho Scoppa, Ariel Rodz, Sound Process, Carlos Alfonsín, Dj Paul, etc.
También fue entrevistada en varias ocasiones por Danzeria web, Infobae TV, Radio
Cultura:Deejay Time, Inprogresso Radio Venezuela, City Radio Venezuela y también Canal
América. Vivió un año en Mallorca en donde estuvo como residente en el reconocido club de la
isla: Selva, y también se presentó en legendarios clubes como R33, Es Moli, Garash, entre otros
junto artistas de gran renombre internacional.
Actualmente enfocada en la producción y lanzamiento de su música.

name: Major Conspiracy
bio:
Jump into the madness of Major Conspiracy! This iconic Dutch DJ Duo was born from a shared passion for music and a boundless love for the Uptempo Hardcore Scene.

These 2 Major guys, better known as Jari van den Broek and Sunny Laan, have become an indispensable part of the Uptempo Hardcore Scene in recent years with their unique “Major” sound and enthusiastic stage performance.

Major Conspiracy started back in 2018 and has been a part of the BKJN Family ever since 2020. From then on they released a lot of collabs with the best artists of the moment and Major hits like “Cocaine Last”, “Dwars Door Het Dak”, “Klapt Door Je Botten" and their “Trip To Holland” Remix. They created a huge, attached fan base with thousands of Major Fans!

After highlights like the Defqon Black and the Intents Festival Mainstage, the 2 boys outdid themselves again with their own sold out “GVD” event in Poppodium 013, which many visitors experienced as one of the best Uptempo Hardcore parties ever.

Prepare yourself for a lot of more madness. The party just started!

name: Mak Negron
bio:
Mak Negron, a rising Colombian DJ and producer on the international scene, is pushing his unique sound to new heights. He has taken his music to iconic Latin American venues such as Club Room (Chile), Vagalume (Tulum), and EDC Mexico in its 2024 and 2025 editions.

In Medellín, his residencies at ANZESTRAL, SUNSET ROOFTOP de Luxe, and Hig Station have made him a key figure in the local electronic music scene. His talent was recognized when he received the award for Best House DJ/Producer in Colombia 2024 and Best House Music DJ Colombia 2025.

His international profile continues to grow: he won the award for Best Electronic Song of the Year at the Estela Awards in Guatemala for "On My Own," a collaboration with Colombian artist Meli Rox.

Mak has made a significant impact on various international radio shows and platforms. He is a resident DJ at La X Medellín and has performed on prestigious programs such as Downtown Tulum Radio, the most influential station in the Mexican Caribbean, and the renowned streaming platform Ephimera Tulum. His career continues to grow with his participation in the iconic Amazona party, organized by renowned DJ and producer Eli Rojas, an event taking place at the legendary Blue Marlin Ibiza, one of the most emblematic venues for electronic music worldwide.

With over 100 releases and signings to labels such as Repopulate Mars, Happy Techno, Whore House, PP Music, BHR, and his own label, Exceder Records, his catalog reflects versatility, technical skill, and a solid sonic identity.

His most recent release, “Paradise 42” featuring Meli Rox, released on March 14th under Exceder Records, showcases his artistic evolution. The music video, produced by Lunatic and directed by Julio César Ángel, reinforces his innovative aesthetic.

The success was immediate: “Paradise 42” reached #1 on La X Medellín’s Top 20, making him the first local electronic music artist to achieve this feat. This milestone confirms Mak Negron’s growth and the strength of his vision within the contemporary electronic music scene.

name: Malcolm Zeller
bio:
At only 21 years old, New York City-based Malcolm Zeller is fast rising in the world of underground House music. His records have become a staple in the sets of some of the most well-respected international DJs including Marco Carola, Jamie Jones, Joseph Capriati and others - making him one of the genre’s youngest and most promising acts. Popping up at iconic venues and shows such as Club Space, Sound LA and EDC Las Vegas, Zeller’s unique and energetic stage presence, combined with his tasteful selections captivates audiences and has established him as a strong live performer. With a slew of upcoming releases and shows, the following season is set to be a breakout period for the young talent.

name: Mambo Brothers
bio:
Christian and Alan Anadon, better known as Mambo Brothers, have been born and raised in Ibiza whilst listening to the best DJs at the Café Mambo DJ booth since an early age. Having  been part of the evolution of electronic music since the beginning,  they have gained knowledge of electronic music from all the house genres. 

Their music style has been heavily influenced by DJs such as Roger Sanchez, Pete Tong, Masters at Work, Jason Bye and more recently Jamie Jones, Kölsch, Luciano and MK, which makes them bring out a broad mixture of vocally tech house with a touch of trendy house tracks from Ibiza throughout the times. Their skill to read the dance floor has given them the ability to adapt to any kind of party and atmosphere.

One half of the Mambo Brothers, Christian, has been introduced to decks at Mambo’s sister bar Savannah, where  he held a residency for many years. He watched legends such as Roger Sanchez and Carl Cox take over the decks as well as warmed up for them on a daily basis. Soon after, in the early 2000’s, Alan joined his older brother to form a brother duo, who often played at local Ibiza nightclubs such as Privilege and Amnesia. 
However, it was not until last year that Mambo Brothers decided to step outside Ibiza and start DJing internationally for “Mambo On Tour” events in cities like London, Miami, Copenhagen, Lugano and Barcelona to name a few. This summer they have played alongside names such as Groove Armada in Pacha Ibiza, 2ManyDJs in Privilege and have done a special deep house set alongside Avicii in Ushuaia. 

Originally raised in the white isle, they have never lost their Scottish accent nor Scottish stamina to party, because they have obviously been hanging out with the wrong people for far too long!!

For bookings: contact@mambobrothersibiza.com

name: Manda Moor
bio:
Bookings worldwide: ed@arcade-talent.com
Brazil: eddie@wildsheepagency.com

Blending her Danish-Filipino heritage with an undeniable flair for the dance floor, Manda Moor has emerged as a defining presence in modern house music. The DJ, producer, and co-founder of Mood Child (Hype label of the Year, Beatport Awards 2025) has become a force in the contemporary scene, known for her signature spicy grooves and contagious energy behind the decks. With a passion that radiates and a refined music taste that never goes unnoticed, Manda Moor continues to shape the underground with every performance and release.

With roots in France and a deep connection to the golden era of Chicago House, Manda’s sound is an intoxicating blend of groove-driven house and techno, infused with raw emotion, bounce, and bold character. Her sets are as flavorful as they are explosive, earning her B2B slots with powerhouses like Jamie Jones, Loco Dice, DJ Sneak, Nic Fanciulli, Nick Curly, Cuartero, Prunk, Reboot, Yaya, and wAFF, artists who not only respect her artistry but actively champion it.

Having topped charts on labels like Hot Creations, Kaluki, Cecille, SB Recs, Paradise, and Tamango, Manda’s breakout EPs What U Want and Picante both claimed #1 on Beatport, cementing her as a production talent to be reckoned with. Her sound has received unwavering support from legends like Carl Cox, Luciano, Joseph Capriati, Marco Carola, Louie Vega, DJ Sneak, Paul Johnson, and Seth Troxler. Moreover, she’s earned the trust of Chicago royalty, remixing icons like DJ Deeon, K-Alexi, DJ Pierre, and Roy Davis Jr.

Beyond her personal success, Manda Moor is building a movement through Mood Child, the acclaimed label, event series, and lifestyle brand she co-founded with Sirus Hood. Voted Beatport’s Hype Label of the Year, Mood Child is known for its authentic community spirit, analog-rich sound, and unforgettable parties. The imprint stands out for its bold, genre-blurring identity and storytelling spirit, with the particularity of releasing only VAs that showcase distinct moods — Wild Moods, Dreamy Moods, Trippy Moods, and more.

As a party series, Mood Child is a space for risk-taking and self-expression, where DJs are encouraged to play outside the box, shifting from disco to dark minimal, from tropical rhythms to hypnotic grooves, while always staying true to their story. It’s more than a party; it’s a celebration of mood, unity, freedom, and musical culture.

Whether it’s at Amnesia Ibiza, Space Miami, Sunwaves, UNVRS, Kappa Futur, Cercle, Creamfields, The Warehouse Project, Printworks, or Hi Ibiza, Manda brings a feverish energy that connects with both seasoned ravers and the next generation of house lovers. Her presence on platforms like Circoloco Radio, Mixmag, Ibiza Global, and DJ Mag only reinforces her reputation as an artist who delivers in the booth, in the studio, and on the global stage.

Manda Moor has stepped into her power, now a reference in the scene and a tastemaker leading the charge for a groovier, spicier future.

name: MANICS
bio:
Popgang Records founders. Indie Dance, Disco & Post House.

Bookings, Press and Inquiries: 
emails@popgangrecords.com
Manics is a Los Angeles based electronic live act and DJ duo comprised of Jordan Deherrera and Chris Sanders. Pulling inspiration from new wave, dark disco, house and modern indie dance, their expansive catalog has received support from the likes of Solomun, Bob Moses, Rex The Dog, Gorgon City, Duke Dumont, Hammer, Mau P, and Poolside to name a select few. Leading to performances at festivals like CRSSD, EDC LV, Proper NYE, Northern Nights, Noise Pop, and forthcoming at Brunch Electronik!
As curators, the duo are the master-minds behind the independent dance music label, POPGANG Records. Founded in 2013, the label features artists across a wide swath of genres, continents and sub-cultures while retaining a cohesive identity built on the punk-DIY mentality turned modern. With over 200 releases to date, POPGANG and Manics’ prolific mark on dance music can be heard around the world.

Check us out at www.popgangrecords.com or on the socials.

name: Mantis
bio:
Kevin Thoma, known professionally as Mantis, was born in Switzerland in 1992 and raised in Uster, Canton Zurich. In the summer of 2009, at the age of 17, he attended his first Psy Trance party and fell in love with the music, the people, and the decorations. This inspired him to organize his own events, and at 18, he founded "Purple Moon Light," which is now known as "Vive Noctem." Over time, Mantis honed his skills as a DJ, transitioning from Progressive Trance to Psytrance and Full On.

In 2011, Mantis made his debut performance in front of an audience and received a warm reception, leading to additional national and international bookings. Some of his notable performances include Organic Festival in Poland, Chilling Monday in Thailand,
SUN  Festival in Hungary, Moon Mountain Valantrance in Thailand, Fabel Festival in Germany, Magic Mountain in Thailand, Ligor Spirit Festival in Thailand, and Belantara Festival in Malaysia.

With over 10 years of experience, Mantis continues to be a passionate DJ, known for his impressive skills and energetic performances.

Biography

Born in Barcelona (Spain) and raised in Sitges, a small town near Barcelona were night life was very popular in the 80's and 90's. There Mar-T got all the interest for electronic music, especially in L'Atlantida Club. DJ and producer since 1995, he is a perfect connoisseur of the dance floors of half the world due to his residency since 1999 in Amnesia Ibiza. This has given him enough experience to be able to adapt to any dance floor without any concessions. His dj sets expose his hedonist and sensual spirit, and knows how to create an atmosphere full of good vibrations due to his sane eclecticism that takes him to mix all aspects of electronic music with great results.

name: MARC ROMBOY
bio:
Over the course of the last three plus decades, the German born DJ, musician and composer Marc Romboy has become synonymous with a soulful electronic music sound that has taken him all over the world. As well as releasing on only the most influential labels, from Innervisions to Cocoon and Kompakt to Senso Sounds, he is also the sole mastermind behind the influential Systematic Recordings label and has been since 2004.

Nowadays an album specialist, 2006 saw him release his debut album, the captivating „Gemini" whilst in 2017 Marc released his first listening long player called „Voyage de la planète“, a pure electronica album with classical music influence and later, in summer 2017 the live recording of his collaboration with the Dortmund Philharmonic Orchestra called „Reconstructing Debussy“, in cooperation with Boiler Room hit the stores.

Despite being a key player for so long, Marc is still as relevant as ever and remains right at the sharp end of electronic music. Proof of that comes in the form of his DJ schedule, which takes him from Fabric to Womb and Berghain to Rex, as well as to not one but three separate Boiler Room shows. All three proved Marc to be a dexterous performer who never relies on obviousness or gimmicks, instead telling truly musical stories that place dancers right at the heart of the action.

name: Marco Lenzi
bio:
Meet Marco Lenzi, an Italian-born DJ and producer who has been a driving force in the techno scene for over 30 years. Raised in Rome, Marco developed his love for electronic music in his teenage years after inheriting some records from his father, who worked as an electronics engineer for NASA. Inspired by producers from the 1960s who weren't afraid to experiment with new sounds and techniques, Marco has built his own unique style of programming and mixing that seamlessly blends genres and keeps the dance floor moving.
In the late 1980s, Marco moved to London and became immersed in the acid house music scene. He was at the heart of two of the best record stores in London at that time, Silverfish Records and Eukatech Records, where he worked alongside fellow techno veterans Nils and Hans Hess and Alex Oppido. Marco and his colleagues transformed Silverfish Records into a cultural hub that included a record shop, a café, an art gallery, and a club, while Eukatech became known for releasing quality music and hosting many label showcases. including the famous Axis Records pop up shop where Jeff Mills played a few sets to his fans and presented his new projects including the limited 3 x 7 inches release which was only sold at Eukatech. This and other initiatives helped Eukatech win an award for best independent record shop in 2005.
Marco has been producing since 1993 and releasing more than 50 vinyls on various labels including Molecular, Search, Missile, Audio, Primate and in 1994 founded Molecular Recordings. 
Based in the UK, Molecular has established itself as a cutting-edge platform for innovative and original techno music. The label has been at the forefront of the techno revolution since its inception, releasing seminal records that have helped shape the sound of the genre. From its early days, Molecular has been synonymous with quality underground techno, releasing material from some of the most respected artists in the scene. Marco Lenzi's own productions have been a cornerstone of the label's output, showcasing his unique style and impeccable production skills. However, Molecular has also been responsible for introducing the world to new talent, with releases from DJ Bone, Chris Liebing, Kelly Hand, Jeroen Search, Claude Young Inigo Kennedy and many others. Molecular's commitment to pushing the boundaries of techno has earned the label a loyal following of fans who appreciate its dedication to quality and originality. With a focus on forward-thinking, experimental techno, Molecular has become a go-to label for those seeking out the cutting-edge of electronic music. In recent years, Molecular has undergone a renaissance, with a renewed focus on releasing new material and reissuing classic tracks from its back catalogue. The label has been receiving major support from industry heavyweights and younger generations alike, cementing its position as a leader in the techno scene. Molecular Recordings' success is in large part due to its founder's vision and passion for music. Marco extensive experience in the industry and his dedication to his craft has made him a respected figure in the techno world. His ability to spot and nurture new talent, combined with his own musical output, has helped to make Molecular Recordings one of the most respected techno labels. As the techno scene continues to evolve, Molecular Recordings remains a vital part of the landscape, providing a platform for artists to showcase their innovative sound and pushing the boundaries of what techno can be. With its rich history and exciting future, Molecular is sure to remain a force to be reckoned with in the world of techno for years to come.
As a techno veteran, Marco has performed in over 50 countries since the late 1990s. He was even voted 49th in the DJ Magazine's Top 100 DJs in the world in 2008, long before social media played a role in determining rankings. Though he took a break from the music business to care for his two daughters and explore a new career path, Marco recently re-launched Molecular Recordings and working on bran new material
Marco's love for music is evident in every set he plays and every release he puts out. With more to come, Marco Lenzi is a DJ and producer who continue to push the boundaries of techno and inspire new generations of electronic music lovers.

In a short space of time, Portuguese national and Bristol based Marco Strous has notched up an impressive set of achievements. With hefty releases on hot labels such as Solid Grooves RAW, Be One, No Excuse, Blanc and more, Marco’s music is talking loud with a reputation that will be the foundation for many years to come.

With a mastery on the decks, Marco’s drive lies within the groove, living to deliver sets specifically designed to pace the dance floor. 

Marco Strous has worked himself to great heights in the tech house scene. With his tracks setting clubs and festivals alight, supported by artists from the likes of Latmun, Pawsa, Michael Bibi, Wade, Dennis Cruz and more. Marco has cemented his status as a prolific DJ, producer and all round quirky guy with more to offer for the future ahead of him.

name: Marco Tropeano
bio:
mgmt/bookings: genny@beatsidebookings.com

Marco Tropeano was born in Naples (Italy) on 10th December 1996. Since he was young he loved listen music of all genres and after the early years, he approached to the funk, jazz and soul music. At the age of 13, he seen his first live dj set in naples by Marco Carola, and he was istant speechless... for the music, for the atmosphere of the club, for the clubbers and for the lights. After one month arrived his first consolle. So he became to play, studied music and at the age of twenty he graduated in Businnes technology education council as sound engineer. He already played in every club of his city at the age of twenty and at the same time he built on his own an home studio several times, where he made his music with ableton, software he knows only too well. He spent all his time in the studio making music supported by big djs as The martinez brothers, Marco Carola, Joseph Capriati and Michael Bibi.

name: Marijn Jansen
bio:
Marijn Jansen (28), born and raised in Utrecht (NL), is an underground House music producer and DJ, formerly known as Native’97.

After winning Michel de Hey's 'Kweekvijver' competition, Marijn had the honor of performing B2B at Mysteryland with Michel, and they agreed to release several EPs on Michel's label 'Future Feel' in 2024.

On March 8, 2024, Marijn released his debut EP on Michel de Hey’s 'Future Feel' label, receiving support from industry giants such as Jamie Jones, Chris Stussy, Benny Rodrigues, and many more.

With multiple remixes, edits, and originals released on the renowned label 'Houz,' Marijn has made a name for himself within the house music scene.

Marijn is has made his debut appearances at venues such as Thuishaven, Colorado Charlie, Bronze Beach, Escape Amsterdam, and on the national radio show The Boom Room by Slam FM.

name: MARINA
bio:
☆ PRINCESS OF POWER (DELUXE) ☆ OUT NOW
https://marina.lnk.to/POPDeluxe

MARINA returns transformed on PRINCESS OF POWER — a euphoric, high-energy exploration of healing, empowerment, and self-reclamation. Written during a period of deep personal reflection, the album marks a turning point for the platinum-selling artist. Where 2021’s Ancient Dreams in a Modern Land looked outward at a fractured world, PRINCESS OF POWER turns inward, embracing vulnerability as strength, turning pain into power and the radical optimism of love.

Now releasing independently through her own label, Queenie Records, in partnership with BMG, MARINA sheds old expectations and fully steps into her own. The album pulses with disco-lit electro pop and lyrical declarations of freedom, feminine energy, and love. Tracks like “BUTTERFLY,” “CUPID’S GIRL,” and “CUNTISSIMO” reflect a woman reborn and thriving on her own terms.


MARINA burst on to the scene in 2009, and has since released five acclaimed albums including Electra Heart (2012), which debuted at Number 1 on the UK’s Official Charts, FROOT (2015), Love + Fear (2019), which debuted Top 5 in the UK and Top 10 on the U.S. Albums chart, and most recently Ancient Dreams in a Modern Land (2021), which featured the Ivor Novello nominated hit “Man's World.”

With PRINCESS OF POWER, MARINA isn’t just making music - she’s building a future rooted in authenticity, creativity, and courage. It’s MARINA as you’ve never seen her, yet never more herself. The deluxe version of the album is out now and features four new songs, including “EVERYBODY KNOWS I’M SAD - REMIX” with Absolutely.

name: Marko De La Rocca
bio:
MARKO DE LA ROCCA  

For the past 19 years MARKO has been the resident DJ for the legendary “La Rocca on Sunday “nights, a quite remarkable achievement.
He’s been called a specialist but everyone agrees: this guy’s got real talent and is a true professional. For years his name has appeared in the top 10 of the Best Belgian DJ’s, and in 2004 he was also voted Best Belgian Progressive DJ . 
In 2010, he takes part of the Radio FG’s World Top DJ’s Contest and reached the position 21 of the ranking.

BIOGRAPHY: 
Marko’s career begins in the late eighties, his reputation grows and he soon becomes established as an important figure in the vibrant Belgian music scene. 
The legendary Belgian club “La Rocca” ask him to take-over their important Sunday night slot in 1992. 
There are many world-class guest DJ’s that have appeared alongside Marko on these Sunday nights, such as : Michel De Hey, Blake Baxter, Andre Nalin, Trevor Rockcliffe, Sander Kleinenberg, David Morales, Oliver Moldan, Marcello, David Guetta, Felix Da Housecat, Sasha, Criss Source, 16 Bit lolitas, Dave Seaman, Dr Kucho, Tiestö and many more – besides all the top DJ’s from the Belgian scene . 

With his obviously natural ability to DJ, Marko became greatly respected as a DJ by professionals. 
Residencies at top clubs such as “At The Villa“(94-96) and “The Fuse“(96-97), Tour & Taxi in Brussels (1998-2000) made Marko a ‘ major player ‘ in Belgium’s clubbing scene. Along the way he’s DJ’d at many massive events such as I Love Techno, Impulz, Extrema, besides playing regularly at the major Belgian Clubs (Versuz, Café d'Anvers, Extrême,…).
  
Since 2000 he’s played gigs all over the European continent including  the Folies Pigalles, Red Light, the 287 and Montana Club in France; the very first Creamfields on the Baltic coast and SQ Klub in Poland; Pacha and K5 in Ibiza; Le Petit Prince and Nature One (Gremany); the Solar Festival, Chemistry and the Heineken Dance Parade in The Netherlands, Carl Cox at Warsaw (Poland 2002).
Back in Belgium, since 2001, Marko has often featured in important line-ups at gigs such as the House Torhout, the Dance-a-Delic festival, 10 Days Off, the huge City Parade (more than 180,000 dance fanatics). 
He headlined the first White Sensation event at Antwerp in April 2005 with Armin Van Büren and Junior Jack; but also the Tomorrowland Festival in 2006 and on the main stage in 2007 ! During 2009, Marko have a new residency at Noxx Club in Antwerp, where he was honoured to share the turntables with Faithless, John Digweed, Sasha and Felix Da Housecat right after their gigs.
    
In terms of releases, Marko has put together many compilations (La Rocca) and releases on diverse labels for labels such as: NEWS, Mackenzie, Bonzai,Tripomatic , Enterprise Records and Massive Drive Recordings. 
He worked with Pole Folder on several remixes including “Inner Turmoil“(released by Bedrock Records). In 2008, he composed “Cult of Sunday” with Elektrokid then; a following tune appears on Banshee Worx in 2009 trough a stupendous association with Laurent Veronnez (Airwave): “Blues Diamond”. 
In 2011, he created “Balkan Brothers” with Barry Fore on Versuz Essentials, a project with a mainroom house smasher : “Hypnotika Mandolina”.

Website    : http://www.djmarko.net   
Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/Marko de la Rocca

name: Marlie
bio:
Marlie’s story begins in London, where she traded the shores of Sydney for the hum of Europe’s underground. The move set her on a new course shaped by rhythm, discipline, and curiosity. Years spent competing as an international gymnast gave her a natural sense of flow and precision, qualities that now define her sound behind the decks.

Her project Roots began in Sydney, taking over small, improvised spaces before finding its footing in London, from intimate gatherings to Room 2 at Fabric. What started as a local idea became a platform for connection and forward-thinking sounds.

She has since played hundreds of shows across Europe and beyond, including appearances at Fabric, DC10, FUSE, and Shelter - Some of the world’s most respected dancefloors. With more exciting projects on the horizon, Marlie continues to carve her path with focus and forward motion, always in the driver’s seat.

name: MaRLo
bio:
For over a decade, MaRLo has been one of the most commanding forces in dance music — a producer, performer, and visionary whose sound has ignited the world’s biggest festivals and arenas.
Voted into the DJ Mag Top 100 DJs five times, MaRLo has built a dedicated global following through monumental releases such as “Lighter Than Air” (ASOT Tune of the Year) and collaborations with artists as diverse as Armin van Buuren and Will Sparks, alongside countless main-stage anthems that define his explosive style.
Beyond his studio output, MaRLo has created his own phenomenon — ALTITUDE, a hard-ticket MaRLo concert series that has evolved into a global brand and rite of passage for fans. In 2024, ALTITUDE Malaysia drew a massive 16,000 fans, while ALTITUDE Melbourne 2025 packed in 14,000 attendees. In total more than 50,000 people experience ALTITUDE every year.
Internationally, MaRLo’s vision continues to expand. In 2024 he hosted the ALTITUDE Stage at Djakarta Warehouse Project (DWP), one of Asia’s largest festivals — a landmark moment that solidified ALTITUDE’s global presence. And in December 2025, the journey ascends again as MaRLo brings the ALTITUDE Stage to Creamfields Thailand, marking the brand’s official debut under the Creamfields banner.
Not content to stay in one lane, MaRLo also launched his hardstyle alias – V3NOM, showcasing a darker, more aggressive side. The debut single dropped on Timmy Trumpet’s SINPHONY label (Spinnin’ Records), followed by a collaboration with Se3k on Dutch Master Works (Showtek’s label) — both earning widespread support across the harder scene and festival stages alike.
With past performances spanning Tomorrowland, Ultra Music Festival, EDC, Creamfields, Parookaville, Airbeat One, Transmission, and A State of Trance, MaRLo continues to headline the world’s most prestigious stages. Through his label REACHING ALTITUDE and ALTITUDE RADIO, he remains a driving force in shaping the next generation of electronic music.
Always armed with fresh ideas, boundary-breaking music, and a vision that fuses art and energy, MaRLo isn’t just playing the main stage — he’s building his own. The ascent continues.

name: Marques Wyatt
bio: Sonic love travels in many dimensions and as it relates to music, Marques Wyatt is a seminal pioneer and is undoubtedly one of the most respected DJ's in the United States and a West Coast legend. In addition to producing some of LA's most legendary clubs/events, many associate him with "DEEP," the illustrious event that he nurtured in his hometown of Los Angeles - thriving and continuing today for well over 19 years. He is one of the few DJ's that have managed to cross pollinate audiences and merge at least two generations of music fans on his dance floors. Thus, he is in demand at clubs, as well as on the festival circuit alike, stateside and abroad. Marques' unerring, knowledgeable selections are sure to stir up some emotions and known to turn huge dance floors into intimate rituals.

Mars is more than a DJ; he is an artist leaving his mark on the future of electronic music.

name: MARTIN IKIN
bio:
DJ’ing since 1990 and Producing music since 1991, Martin Ikin previously known as;  DJ Mayhem, Indigo, Soul Purpose, Migrant.. and loads more, has spent his life releasing records on many labels and under many aliases. Including, Defected, Nervous, OFF, Get Physical, Exploited, Zrecords, 3Beat, MOS, SwingCity, Hed Kandi, Soulfuric, Sony, Island, Atlantic..etc etc.
Martin's remix credentials include names such as Mariah Carey, Jamiroquai, Joey Negro, MAW, Grant Nelson, Hardsoul and many more...
Trained studio engineer and jazz pianist Martin stepped away from producing and engineering for others and launched his own label Soul Purpose Records in 2003, as a stable for his own productions.
2005 saw Martin adopted his label name "Soul Purpose" as his DJ & Production/Remix moniker, dropping the old school "Mayhem" tag from the early 1990's 
Now Djing & Producing using his real name for the first time ever! Martin kicks of with a Monster release on Andre Crom's OFF Recordings. Watch out for lots of brand new music coming from Martin on some of the biggest labels in the game including more on the mighty OFF Recordings.
As a musician and producer Martin draws his musical influences from the likes of Stevie Wonder, Herbie Hancock, Oscar Peterson, Azymuth, Donny Hathaway, Jeff Lorber, Roy Ayers and legendary house masters like Mr Fingers, Marshall Jefferson, Derek May & Kevin Saunderson.

name: Martin Trevy
bio: Martin Trevy is a Colombian artist, DJ, and producer who has evolved his sound, now blending cinematic Melodic Techno with high-impact energy for powerful, emotionally driven performances. His music has earned the support of global names including Tiësto, Agents of Time, MEDUZA, Alok, Lost Frequencies, and David Guetta. He has released music on major electronic labels including Tomorrowland Music, Interscope Records, Armada Music, Kontor Records, and Warner Music Germany, among others. From Ushuaïa Ibiza and Ultra Music Festival to Tomorrowland Belgium (July 2026), his shows go beyond music, combining immersive laser design, dynamic visuals, and high-impact energy to transform the dancefloor into a shared experience. Through his new concept, Martin creates moments of connection where light, sound, and frequency merge into a ritualistic live experience.

bio:
Multi-Verse

🪐bookings: mgmt@supermusicgroup.com

Mary Jane is a combination of indie twists. Intertwining the psychedelic sounds found in our universe, both nostalgic and modern. Inspired by her many years of exploring galaxies & eventually discovering the magical Miami tropics, she has forged her sound with a funky merge of frequencies that travel within a futuristic soundscape, making the otherworldly side of music accessible. Crafting herself as Producer, DJ, Songwriter, & Vocalist. 
Mary Jane is playing Funk driven Indie Dance accented with Acid & Italo Disco, grounded in House music. Using her own vocals to guide your trip to new places, storytelling through word & sound is her way of conducting a proper journey to a new realm unifying everyone's frequencies.
Recently signing her track with Yamagucci ’Please You’ to the renowned Label ‘Maccabi House’ her style is unfolding as she solidifies herself within the indie dance scene. Following up with many special collaborations Mary Jane will definitely be taking off to new heights this year.

name: Mary Mesk
bio:
Elements that transcend the soul are the essence of Mary Mesk’s inspiration in her music. A rising artist, she has already made her mark on some of the world’s biggest festivals, performing on the stages of Lollapalooza, Burning Man, Tomorrowland, and DGTL.

name: Masanori Morita
bio:
MASANORI MORITA (STUDIO APARTMENT)

Japan’s leading dance music producer and DJ.  "STUDIO APARTMENT”(SA) as a track unit, has released 9 original albums and more than 300 original tracks from various labels (Defected,Toolroom, King Street, Soul Candi, etc) around the globe.

SA has won the top of the “BEST OF DEEP HOUSE 2008” and also being in chart of “BEST DEEP HOUSE TRACK” in 2009 on Beatport with their original track. This was very first achievement by producer from Asia.

In addition, 8 of their original tracks were ranked as no 1 in the full chart of  "Traxsource" which is the biggest house music download site. In the recent Japanese music industry, they are one of few artists who left foot print in the global music arena. 

SA also attends world’s dance music conference ADE(Amsterdam Dance Event) as well as WMC(Winter Music Conference) in Miami (ADE 4 years in row/WMC 9 years in row), in 2012 Masanori played resident DJ at the world’s biggest dance club “Privilege Ibiza” (with the capacity of 12,000 audience) which is found in the GUNESS BOOK.  

Outside of music scene, through the collaboration with the glasses producer "OLIVER PEOPLES" SA released first model "SAOP" from [STUDIO APARTMENT × OLIVER PEOPLES] globally in 2009. 2nd model was also released as「SAOPⅡ」in 2011.

In their home country Japan, for the celebration of STUDIO APARTMENT 10 years anniversary, "JAPANESE SONG"(EMI) and "MINNA NO UTA"(EMI) were released in 2012. Most of the tracks were written in Japanese language for the first time since the unit had started.  

These 2 albums staring the hottest artists in Japan such as KETSUMEISHI, KISHIDAN, TRF, MEISA KUROKI, JAY’ED, RIP SLYME, MISIA, KEN HIRAI, CRYSTAL KAY and "LIFE" by KIMAGUREN (STUDIO APARTMENT Remix) was tied up with au mobile phone ”Spotio” CM. The track achieved over 2,000,000 downloads as a remix record.

SA organised one of the biggest house party at ageHa in summer,  WORLD MUSeUM(from 2008) has great attention from all over the world. “STUDIO APARTMENT band” has over 40 musicians (12 strings/6 horn section/10 chorus) on stage and performed live house music and event DVD was released in 2009.

In 2006, STUDIO APARTMENT established their own label, Apt. and Apt. They debuted a lot of artists of the new generation of Japan. The artists representing Japan from the label are DAISHI DANCE, PAX JAPONICA GROOVE etc.   

SA also released tracks produced by the top dance music producer such as Dennis Ferrer, Kerri Chandler, Jarome Sydenham and plays significant role to introduce world’s standard dance music to Japan nation.

Currently they are working on a lot of new tracks for their new project.

name: MashBit
bio:
Blue Marble 🌎

MGMT: shay@leftbrainent.com

Dariush Mash, professionally known as MashBit, is a Los Angeles based DJ and producer blending melodic house with deep Persian musical influence. Born in Sardinia, Italy and fully Persian by heritage, MashBit’s sound reflects a lifelong balance between cultures, now expressed through emotionally driven electronic music.
He first broke through in the EDM scene by creating dubstep mashups that went viral on TikTok, building a dedicated fanbase drawn to his instinct for energy and emotion. As his artistry evolved, MashBit began carving out a new lane in melodic house, a shift that surprised many early listeners but marked a more personal and intentional chapter in his career.
His productions fuse modern melodic house frameworks with Persian inspired melodies, synth work, and regional percussion, creating music that feels both contemporary and timeless. With a formal background in music, having studied at music college and graduating in 2019, MashBit pairs technical foundation with instinctive, emotional storytelling.
Notable releases include Tidal Wave, Light, and Irreplaceable, alongside his remix of Bayou’s Persian Girl, a defining example of his ability to translate Persian musical identity into a Western electronic context.
Driven by the goal of representing Persian culture on a global stage, MashBit is carving a distinct lane within melodic house, one that honors heritage while pushing forward into new territory.

name: Mat Weasel Busters
bio:
An active member of the band Fant4stik with Guigoo, Billx and Floxytek, Mat Weasel has been for years one of the leaders of the Hardtek scene. With a unique ability to seamlessly mix between powerful tracks and 90’s pop punk rave bootlegs, he is proving to be an essential and significant link between the different hard beats scenes: Hardtek, Frenchcore, UK Hardcore and Happy Hardcore.
Mat’s first releases in the late 90’s were like an electroshock on the Hardtekno scene of this time, his Happy Hardcore and Makina influences contrasted so much with the hypnotic and spiritual sounds from other producers. He was the first to release Hardtek at 200bpm, the first to use “kick-bass” based tracks (a bass shot offbeat between two kicks) and tricky cuts every 4 bars. His first vinyl release directly launched him to the top of scene, alongside other artists of his generation: Guigoo, Kefran, Vinka, Gotek, MSD…

Mat Weasel has played an impressive range of venues, from the biggest festivals like Monegros, Dreambeach, Masters of Hardcore, Ground Zero and many more to the best clubs like Pacha, Magazzini Generali, Le Bikini… And he has rocked parties all around the world, from China, Japan, Venezuela and Russia, as well as nearly every single European country!

name: Matt Fax
bio:
A producer who has been earning releases on prestigious labels since the age of 15, Matt Fax’s name in Progressive & Trance circles has increasingly become synonymous with, & rightly mentioned alongside the modern pioneers of the genre.

Matt’s extensive catalogue behind him offers an unparalleled diversity of sounds firmly rooted in his melodic, atmospheric pedigree.
For a producer who has only just hit his twenties, he’s able to boast a host of career achievements; releases on labels like Enhanced Music, Armada, & Anjunabeats, Garuda, Statement!, including a full album release on Colorize, official remix works for a-list stars; Armin van Buuren, Tritonal, Gareth Emery, collaborations with scene legends like BT & regular support from international radio shows including; BBC Radio1, A State of Trance & Group Therapy.

Having recently diversified with his Matters side project, and with a newly launched bi-weekly radio show ‘The Showcase’ broadcast worldwide via DI.fm, the Matt Fax approach to Progressive has earned him a loyal, global fan base and is now widely considered one of the leading lights responsible for pushing the Progressive sound forward.

With a 2019 that will see some of his most exciting projects yet, as well as building on his impressive live accolades which so far includes the legendary Ministry of Sound main room, Matt Fax is set & primed to continue his inspiring rise.

name: Matt Guy
bio:
📧 : George@milkhoneyla.com 

Matt Guy, an established force in the dance music scene, first gained widespread attention after being heralded by Radio 1 as a breakthrough artist, with one of the summer's hottest ID’s and an Essential New Tune, courtesy of Pete Tong.

Since then, heavy rotations from Danny Howard and Sarah Story, coupled with consistent club support from luminaries like Solomun, Adam Beyer, Camelphat, Joseph Capriati, and Vintage Culture, have solidified Matt’s position as one of the UK's most prominent dance acts. 

Matt has demonstrated remarkable versatility as both a DJ and producer, delivering remixes and original tracks on esteemed labels such as Diynamic, Drumcode, Truesoul, EMI, Positiva and Armada. Over the past year, he has captivated audiences worldwide, performing at major venues and festivals including Tomorrowland, Brunch Electronik, OFFSónar, Hideout, Warehouse Project and touring as far afield as Australia. 

As an artist he has continued to build his reputation, not only as a sought after producer, but also as an exceptional selector, sharing the stage with industry giants such as Solomun, Adam Beyer, Gorgon City, Eli Brown, Hannah Laing and Dom Dolla. 

With an ever-expanding discography and an impressive roster of live performances, Matt Guy has firmly established himself as a staple in the dance music industry, proving that he is a formidable talent here to stay.

name: Matt Lange
bio:
Multi-platinum selling producer, composer, musician, and DJ, Matt Lange challenges categorization; equipped with an instinctual ear for creating music and an insatiable drive to explore the aural spectrum.

Lange’s career began working alongside multi-instrumentalist and producer Brian Transeau (BT), co-producing the album "These Hopeful Machines," earning him a Grammy Award-nomination in 2011. Matt then went on to co-write and produce Glenn Morrison’s "Goodbye (feat. Islove)" which was nominated as Dance Recording of the Year at the 2015 Juno Awards and later hit double platinum. Most recently, Lange was a producer on the Thirty Seconds To Mars album "AMERICA," which debuted #2 on the Billboard Top 200 chart.

An adept music composer, and sound designer, Lange has created and licensed works for the blockbuster films Ready Player One, Blade Runner 2049, Deadpool 2, The Fast & Furious 8, and Transformers: The Last Knight along with video game franchises Counter-Strike Global Offensive, Tom Clancy's Rainbow Six Siege, and DOTA II.

As an artist, Matt Lange has released records with some of the most influential electronic dance music labels in the industry such as Anjunabeats, mau5trap, and Armada and has performed across esteemed venues and festivals like Output, Sound Nightclub, Ministry of Sound, TomorrowWorld, EDC, and SXSW. Unburdened by genre and trends, the signature of Lange’s work is the relentless devotion to pushing music into the future.

Matt is also the host of Tap Tempo, a podcast which features insightful interviews with peers and collaborators ranging from A-list composers to DJs and includes artists from all backgrounds.

bio: Being considered relatively known on the international scene, Marseille based DJ and producer Matt Sassari has suitably proven his strength in both the studio and behind the decks. With releases on notable labels such as CR2 / Truesoul / Panterre Musique / Terminal M / Intec / Relief. Matts unique blend of Techno and Tech House made his first top 1 overall beatport chart with 'Put A Record On' in 2019. Followed by his newest 'Give it to me' record an official adaptation of Timbaland’s 2007 Hip-Hop classic and US Billboard #1 + #1 UK Singles Chart, featuring Nelly Furtado and Justin Timberlake. ‘Give It To Me’ has been recently certified Gold Disc. Implementing his effortless live style on stage, Matt’s productions have proven to be popular and resulted in over 12 million monthly Spotify listeners and taking him across the globe. With continued support from likes of Carl Cox, Adam Beyer, Joseph Capriati, Chris Leibing, Nicole Moudaber. This is just the beginning for Matt Sassari.

name: Mauro Picotto
bio:
As the first Italian DJ to tour the world, he’s put his homeland on the global techno map. As the first DJ to mix live on the eminent BBC music show Top Of The Pops, he’s helped bring techno to the widest audience possible. As the man behind Meganite – one of Ibiza’s most successful and longest running nights – he has recruited some of the world’s most respected underground DJs as residents; Adam Beyer, Marco Carola and Chris Liebing.

This journey to legendary status began over 25 years, 700 releases and 7 million unit sales ago when he became the first Italian finalist in the world DMC championships in 1988. Galvanising this success the following year with a win on a live broadcast Italian DJ competition called The Walky Cup, his national crown as a premiership DJ was realised... And the world beckoned.

A string of sonic successes, dancefloor dominance and industry victories followed; early chart appearances as R.A.F and co- writing for myriad European house acts during the early 90s led him to become a partner Media Records, while his reptilian trilogy in 1998 elevated him to a global level; ‘Lizard’, ‘Iguana’ and ‘Komodo (Save A Soul)’ fused trance with techno on such a level they became hymns for the biblical superclub explosion during the last few years of the 20th century and charted in many countries. From this point onwards, the world could no longer ignore the dance music and techno phenomenon. And Mauro was driving from the front. As one of the most in-demand artists across the globe, he barely left DJ Mag’s illustrious Top 100 DJ list throughout the first decade of the 21st century.

Constantly searching for innovative developments – both musically and technically – Mauro expressed an early vision that is now common place within electronic music: his ability to bring the underground to the masses, to fuse melody, hooks and harmony with industrial strength drum dynamics, his innate understanding of widescreen DJ selections that cover the whole spectrum created a reputation that positioned him in all corners of techno.

This focus and attitude meant that as a DJ he’s been invited to perform the broadest possible range of peaktime sets from Berlin’s famed Love Parade to Turin Winter Olympics via Timewarp, Tomorrowland, MTV Festival, Awakenings, Sensation, Mayday, Ultra Music Festival, Space Miami, Ibiza and thousands more. As an artist this gave him the freedom to flex from major remixes of top tier acts like Freddie Mercury and The Pet Shop Boys while delivering extensive albums that explore every side of techno with daring experimentation with tracks such as ‘Baguette’, ‘Contaminato’, ‘Hong Kong’, ‘The Riff’ and ‘Asteroids’.

As well as his journeyman DJ sets and full spectrum productions, this vision is also evident in his two brands. Both established in the early 2000s and still going strong to date, his Meganite events and Alchemy label are both melting pots for evolution and development. Meganite at Privilege is one of Ibiza’s most infamous techno parties and has since gone on to take over clubs and arenas across Europe and the US while Alchemy has delivered cuts from the likes of Adam Beyer, Chris Liebing, Joseph Capriati, Paco Osuna, Popof, Sasha Carassi, The Advent, Steve Rachmad, Nicole Moudaber and many more. Not just a label, Alchemy has also given the world a successful festival in Mauro’s motherland Turin in 2010 and is the home to his hugely popular podcast series that is syndicated across the world and listened to by audiences of millions.

name: Max Low
bio:
Max Low, a house music duo from Los Angeles with origins in Seattle, embodies the essence of fun and camaraderie that has fueled their journey in dance music. Stemming from years of friendship, their path to success is rooted in humble beginnings – a serendipitous meeting while working at a clothing store – and a shared passion for music. Jamie and Kiraleigh’s evolution from enthusiastic club-goers to a force in house music underscores their dedication and unique journey.

In 2023, Max Low expanded their presence with performances at notable festivals, including EDC Las Vegas, Day Trip Festival, and Groove Cruise Miami. On the touring front, they touched down in major cities like Las Vegas, Miami, Chicago, Amsterdam, and supported renowned artists such as Tiësto, Oliver Heldens and Biscits.

Their discography, featuring tracks on prominent labels like IN/ROTATION and Terminal Underground, and remixes like the acclaimed "Scandalous" remix for Gryffin and Tinashe, displays their versatile production skills. Resonating with fans and earning accolades from influential industry figures such as Alison Wonderland, Claptone, Tiësto and Matroda, Max Low is crafting a significant footprint in dance music.

Their inclusion in the 1001Tracklists Future Of Dance list solidified Max Low as emerging leaders in dance music. As two women united by one mission, they are not just creating music; they are crafting unforgettable moments, setting the stage for a continued rise to global acclaim.

name: MaxGraham
bio:
Messages here are NOT checked, hit me on IG 

BIo: Max Graham has always forged a path of his own, over the course of his career he’s drawn from multiple influences to create a sound that is a unique combination of Techno, Progressive and Trance. From his signature emotive releases to his famed story telling dj sets he flawlessly fuses genres everywhere from globally renowned festivals like Tomorrowland to his trademark ‘Open to Close’ sets in the best clubs in the world. Max’s love for the art form of mixing and his obsession with finding new music can be heard in the hugely successful CD series ‘Cycles’ and popular radio show ‘Cycles Radio’
It is this dedication that ensures the audience at his shows is always taken on an incredible journey.

Projects like ‘Dare Your Move’ marked essential moments in his artistic evolution, paving the way for an impressive catalog of globally celebrated hits. Releases such as ‘If You Need It’, ‘Everybody Get Up’ and ‘Nothing On Me’ - have garnered support from industry heavyweights worldwide. His remix of Rüfüs Du Sol’s ‘Music Is Better’ and Mahmut Orhan’s ‘Pangea’ further solidified his reputation as a creator of undeniable floormaterial.

Maxi’s desire to succeed and unwavering passion have positioned him as one of the most original and inspiring figures in the electronic music scene, as he continues to captivate audiences worldwide.

name: Maxwell
bio: Maxwell has artfully managed to transfix music lovers for more than two decades, releasing five studio albums, all in his own time and all duly anointed as classics. The soul singer redefined soul music in April of 1996 when he released his critically acclaimed debut on Columbia, ‘Maxwell’s Urban Hang Suite.’ It earned Grammy nominations, double platinum status and RIAA gold for the single, “Ascension (Don’t Ever Wonder).” The platinum albums ‘Embrya’ (1998) and ‘Now’ (2001) followed. In 2009, Maxwell’s ‘BLACKsummers’night’ debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200, earning two Grammy awards, including Best R&B Album. With a total of 4 platinum album certifications from the RIAA, Maxwell’s latest album, ‘blackSUMMERS’night,’ earned him a third Grammy (Best R&B Song for “Lake By The Ocean”), an NAACP Image Award (Outstanding Male Artist), and a Soul Train Award (Best R&B/Soul Male Artist). Recent accolades for Maxwell include the “Legend” Award at the 2021 Soul Train Awards and a performance at the 2022 Billboard Music Awards, where he paid tribute to Michael Jackson with “The Lady In My Life.” His critically acclaimed ‘The Night Tour’ also made Pollstar’s 2022 list of “Top 20 Global Concert Tours,” determined by average box office gross and the average ticket price for shows worldwide.

name: Mefjus
bio:
Based out of Linz, north Austria, Martin Schober is a singular protagonist at the forefront of this beguiling game we call drum & bass. He likes hip-hop, skateboarding, schnitzel, Leibniz biscuits and long walks in the sunset, but he’s most respected for how he traipses across electronic music’s wildest terrains with total boundary abandonment… And is regarded as a leading influential new-gen figure in the genre. 

From his agenda-setting halftime twist of ‘Sunday Crunk’ to his rolling, emotional collabo cameo on Camo & Krooked’s acclaimed album ‘Mosaik’. From his entrance into the Fabriclive mix hall of fame with a mix album comprising entirely of his own productions (‘Fabriclive 95’) to his Drum&BassArena Award-winning debut album ‘Emulation’, Mefjus’s signature sound has been felt across the furthest expanses of the genre since he emerged in the early 2010s. 

Now working closely with Vision - the label run by kindred studio spirits Noisia - Mefjus continues to fine-tune his musical syntax, technical dexterity, eye for detail and deft groove sensibilities. The latest chapter to savour this on-going flux of development is his second album ‘Manifest’.

Released April 2018, ‘Manifest’ is the sound of Mefjus 2.0. After several years in the studio wilderness, exploring the dark science of song structure, musicality and textural contrasts, ‘Manifest’ captures a new mindset for Mefjus. Raw, energetic, playful and subversive, ‘Manifest’ is the most personal, diverse and daring body of work to date. Not so much as reminder of why he occupies such a unique position in drum & bass but a straight-up statement of intent.

So now you know. And knowledge is power. Thanks for reading.

name: Megan Thee Stallion
bio:
Hailing from Houston, Megan Thee Stallion is a three-time GRAMMY-winning recording artist, actor, philanthropist and entrepreneur. From earning two Billboard Hot 100 No. 1 hits with the “Savage (Remix)” featuring Beyoncé, and “WAP” with Cardi B to releasing her dynamic album “Traumazine,” Megan has proven unstoppable.  

 

Megan has been recognized for her musical achievements, including three GRAMMY wins, nine BET Awards and back-to-back Billboard Music Awards for “Top Rap Female Artist.” Additionally, she has been honored for her advocacy efforts, having received the 2022 Special Achievement Award at The Webby Awards and the Trailblazer Award at the iHeartRadio Music Awards.  

 

Most recently, Megan made history in Nov. 2022, becoming the first Black woman to appear on the cover of Forbes’ prestigious Under 30 issue. She was previously recognized as one of TIME’s 100 Most Influential People of 2020 after publishing her monumental “Why I Speak Up For Black Women” op-ed for The New York Times.

bio: Meguru, born in Shenzhen, Guangdong, is an electronic music producer and DJ from mainland China. She is known for her Hard Techno and Neorave styles, and is the first female DJ from mainland China to perform on the main stage of Belgium's Tomorrowland festival, as well as the first Chinese artist invited to the Netherlands' Verknipt festival. German born and Jamaican raised Melanie Ribbe is not new to the electronic music scene. Melanie's raw passion for music has been with her since childhood, starting recording blank cassette mixtapes in her bedroom at 8 years old, continuing through teenage years making mixes then digitally upon receiving her first computer. 

Her love and passion for music led her to pursue a career with great determination from an early age and enroll in the London Academy of Music Production to master the art of music and hone her skills. After Melanie got signed by her first agent in 2014, she started her career with her official debut at the Miami Music Week in 2015 alongside strong lineups. Shortly after, Melanie secured to perform at the opening of Amnesia Ibiza which resulted in a two year residency at Amnesia and at Cova Santa Ibiza with her own party called "Melanie Ribbe & Friends". During those two seasons on the island, she made a name for herself and played amongst the heavy weights of the industry. 

Melanie’s first EP was released on the industry’s acclaimed label Moon Harbour, the track "Get It Right" managed to climb Beatport's top 100 chart. After that her stimulating, groovy and precise sound rhetoric led her to release on successful labels such as Saved, Viva Limited, Mindshake, Roush & re-publishing on Toolroom compilations with support from the most respected names of the industry, in addition to collaborations with Paco Osuna and Reboot. 

On stage Melanie is creative and eloquent, she is distinguished by her unique tech-house style that get the crowds moving, skills that have taken her to tour worldwide and play at some of the biggest clubs and festivals in the world such as Fabrik Madrid, We are Festival, D-Edge and Lollapalooza.

In 2018 Ribbe secured a residency in Brazil’s hottest new venue ‘Ame Club’. In 2020 Melanie founded her own music label, Agápe Muzik, and the Agápe Showcases alongside a video streaming series at unusual locations called “Melanie Ribbe x Drop” on YouTube. In June 2021 she released her first artist album, DANCE AGAIN, on her label Agápe Muzik.

Melanie currently also hosts a monthly residency on french originated international radio “Uncoded Radio” while having frequent appearances on radio stations like Ibiza Global Radio, Ibiza Sonica, Pure Ibiza, and has curated previous guest mixes for British Airways, Kaluki, Moon Harbour and Toolroom. 

Melanie Ribbe lives and breaths music, any spare moment she has, she prefers to produce music rather than anything else as she is moved by a single purpose: to communicate through music, conceiving it as the object and the means to generate deep emotions.

name: Mell Tierra
bio:
Mell Tierra is aiming for the top and wants to reach everybody with his music. His progressive and electro house releases on some of the world’s biggest labels such as Revealed Recordings, Spinnin’, Armada, CR2 and Flamingo Recordings prove his talent and got him supported by world famous DJs such as Tiësto and Hardwell.

Over these last few years Mell has garnered a loyal fanbase. Next to support from Tiesto and Hardwell, there is a wealth of goodwill for this talented DJ from all corners of the scene. Also well-known artists such as Armin van Buuren, Gareth Emery, Marcus Schossow, Laidback Luke, Markus Schulz, Paul Oakenfold, Paul van Dyk, Sander van Doorn and Thomas Gold have all supported Mell Tierra’s tracks.

In Holland, Mell Tierra has entertained the audience of the biggest and most popular venues. Clubs like Escape, Matrixx, Bloomingdale, Panama, Westergasfabriek and Crystal Venue are among the grand list of Dutch venues where Mell has performed. With the support of his releases, the international career has made a flying start for Mell. Aruba, Russia, Spain, Czech Republic, Austria, Ireland, Taiwan and even Tomorrowland in Belgium made it onto his list of gigs abroad. Mell Tierra gives the audience the urge to dance and injects clubs and festivals with the maximum amount of energy.

Mell also aims to reach an audience through online media with his DJ mixes. In Mell Tierra Monthly, fans of the genre can listen to a balanced mix of known hits, Mell Tierra exclusives, bootlegs, and also the deeper style of Mell’s taste in genre. Mell Tierra is an artist who continues to develop as a producer as well as a DJ. The aim of being a DJ is essentially to play what the crowd wants, not simply what you like to play. However, building your own crowd, by producing your own music, allows the possibility to be able to play what you like. Mell is keen on participating in the EDM scene on a global level, and has his mind set on reaching the entire world with his music.

Bookings: bookings@melltierra.com
Management: management@melltierra.com

name: Mesa & Boss
bio:
Mesa & Boss is a Texas based DJ/Producer duo which consists of Kenneth Boss and Joe Mesa. Elevating their love of music by incorporating multiple genres into their DJ sets has landed them shows at venues internationally. 

Quickly making their mark in the EDM scene, Mesa & Boss are a very spontaneous and uniquely wired Duo who are not afraid to break the rules and push the boundaries of our perception with their deeply layered and well-crafted production. 

Both raised in Fort Worth, Texas, USA, their drive, focus, and tenacity will lead them to become a relentless and emerging force in the independent circuit. Mesa & Boss is making music that is driven by a desire to make you feel the emotion and love for the genre.

Mesa & Boss has been direct support for the liking of Max Vangeli, FELIX DA HOUSECAT, Steve Lawler, Paige, Alex The Kid, Lucky Date. 
Receiving support from Max Vangeli, NoFace Records, Austin Kramer, Onno van Kemenade, Taipan Empire Records, Tales Of Freedom, and Mystery Freedom Records. 
Reaching the charts in Turkey, Mexico, and Russia. 

The upcoming projects will highlight their passion and love for music as an art form. They are delving deeper into the facets that encompass the human psyche. This talented duo is here to reshape and leave an indelible mark in the industry.

Be on the lookout for a packed release and tour schedule for 2022-2023.

name: Metta & Glyde
bio:
Metta & Glyde are a UK-based duo who are frontrunners within the modern wave of trance. Their signature sound, an ultra-modern take on energetic classic trance, is rocking the planet, making them one of the most sought-after acts on the global scene. Hailed by Sean Tyas as "The modern-day Alphazone", their no-nonsense, emotional yet high-energy style captures the imagination and translates perfectly to the trance floor. Topping the Beatport trance chart has already been achieved three times through tracks 'Renaissance' and 'Storm' on FSOE and FSOE Fables, and also with their remix of ‘The Oasis’ by Talla 2XLC on That’s Trance. A collaboration with their mentor Sean Tyas 'The Unfamiliar' on Surgikal plus many more successful releases keeps this production juggernaut rolling out tracks and remixes on labels such as FSOE, VII, Skullduggery, Regenerate, FSOE Fables, Nocturnal Knights, Find Your Harmony, Amsterdam Trance, and their own label, One Forty, to name a few.

The Beatport Top 10 is a regular hang out for this awesome twosome, collaborating with artists such as Sean Tyas and Ferry Tayle, plus remixing Talla 2XLC 'The World In My Eyes', David Gravell & Corti Organ 'Bliss', Sean Tyas & Darren Porter 'The Potion' has propelled the Metta & Glyde name worldwide. Regular features on multiple compilations and featured guest mixes and streams for heavyweights Aly & Fila, Andrew Rayel, Dreamstate, and Luminosity, have further helped build this exciting duo into a fan's favourite.

Metta & Glyde are a must-see act and their mission to give people those special dancefloor moments and long-lasting memories is well underway.

Freedom. Groove. Emotion.

Management: hello@jassigonzalez.com
Promos: mianeworks@gmail.com 

Miane has established herself as one of the most solid names in international electronic music, forging her own sound and unparalleled versatility. Her talent has led her to release on prestigious labels such as Hot Creations, Black Book, Saved, DFTD, Repopulate Mars, and Knee Deep in Sound, earning the support of heavyweights from the scene like Jamie Jones, Chris Lake, Nic Fanciulli, Lee Foss, and Carl Cox. 
Additionally, she has worked as a remixer for renowned artists such as Hot Since 82 and Gorgon City, and the success of her own tracks like “Who Are You,” remixed by Chris Lake himself, which has already accumulated tens of millions of streams.

Thanks to the quality of her productions, her influences from soul and R&B, and her unique mixing style, Miane has been part of legendary parties such as Paradise, Black Book, and Elrow, and has performed at top-tier festivals like Coachella (Indio), Movement (Detroit), EDC (Las Vegas), Dreambeach (Spain), and Mysteryland (Amsterdam), among many others.

With each new step, Miane reaffirms her unstoppable evolution and rightfully rises as an essential figure in the global electronic scene.

name: MichaelBM
bio:
DJ/PRODUCTOR LATINO

MichaelBM has emerged as one of the most prominent names in the Latin House scene, captivating both critics and fans with his versatile production style that spans from Latin Tech to Afro House. With releases on some of the most prestigious record labels in the electronic music industry, including Sola Recordings (Armada), CR2 Records, Helix Records (Payday Records), and Tech It Deep Records, among others, MichaelBM has made an indelible mark on the global music landscape.

2024 has been a pivotal year for MichaelBM, with hits like “Taka Taka” and “Travesuras” propelling him to stardom. These vibrant and energetic tracks have been supported by industry giants like Gordo, Solardo, Cloonee, Carlita, and Paco Osuna, solidifying his position as one of the most influential Latin House DJs today. His latest single, "Bonito," a collaboration with Twenty Six and Tech It Deep, is dominating the charts this summer, becoming one of the hottest tracks of the season.

Beyond his success in the studio, MichaelBM has taken his sound to the world’s top stages with the highly successful "Taka Taka World Tour." With over 20 performances across the globe and more than 10 sold-out shows in cities like Buenos Aires, Montañita, Lima, and Gran Canaria, MichaelBM has proven that his music transcends borders. He has performed at some of the most iconic clubs and festivals, including Lost Beach Club in Ecuador (DJMag #25), Duplex in Prague (DJMag #53), Baloo in Ibiza, and the legendary EDC in Mexico.

With the creation of his own record label, ‘Latin House Gang,’ MichaelBM is determined to further push the electronic Latin scene, bringing his passion and creativity to new heights. Without a doubt, MichaelBM is a name that will continue to resonate in the global electronic music scene, setting the pace for the evolution of Latin House.

bio:
Mike & Me is a DJ and music producer who broke onto the scene in 2019 with a remix of Coolio’s iconic Gangsta’s Paradise, which has since reached over 17 million views online.
He made his mark by releasing music on respected labels such as Stereohype, Terminal Underground, South of Saturn, Low Ceiling, Blanc, Hot Fuss, Uncommon and FRCST .
With a former residency at Noa Beach Club, one of Europe’s top party destinations, Mike & Me has played in some of the world’s leading venues, including Ministry of Sound (London), Revelin (Dubrovnik), Duplex (Prague), Shôko (Barcelona), Teatro Kapital (Madrid), 1900 (Hanoi) and Republic (Pattaya).
He has also brought his sound to major festivals like Tomorrowland, Ultra Europe, V-Fest (Vietnam), MTV Summerblast, Forestland Festival, and Freaks of Nature (Riyadh).
Known for his high-energy sets and a sound that blends groovy tech house with punchy basslines, Mike & Me continues to make his mark across global dancefloors.

name: MIRO
bio:
Born in Bruges in 2000, Miro began his musical journey at age 14, dedicating over a decade to perfecting his craft as a producer and DJ. Known for his innovative edits and soulful sets, he has performed at prestigious festivals such as Tomorrowland and WeCanDance, as well as iconic venues like Bloody Louis (Brussels) and Versuz (Belgium).
Miro has built a massive following in South Africa, driven by his viral Gqom and Amapiano remixes that have become crowd favorites in the region. After a thriving three-week Africa tour in 2023 including shows in the Republic of Congo his unique sound caught the attention of international promoters.
In addition to his own shows, Miro is also the tour DJ for Cristian D, performing across numerous festivals and venues in Europe. Looking ahead, Miro is set for his own South Africa tour in December 2025, bringing his high-energy performances and signature edits to fans across the country.
Follow Miro’s journey on Instagram and TikTok where his distinctive sound keeps growing a loyal international fanbase.

name: Misstress Barbara
bio:
Established in the 90s, Misstress Barbara (word play between Miss and Stress) is a pioneering DJ/Producer and one of the first female superstar DJs who helped inspire future generations with her explosive Techno sets. Whilst headlining major festivals and events globally, there was a period in the ’00s when she was consistently voted inside of DJ Mag’s Top 100 DJs.

Born in Italy, she moved to Canada at age 8. Curious and passionate by nature, she loves exploring new fields and reaching new goals. To name a few, she is a drummer, she has a glider and private pilot license, she graduated University in Communications/Cinema, she is a boat captain and sailing instructor, and she also launched her own bean-to-bar chocolate brand Barbon Chocolate, crafting everything by hand herself. A woman of many talents indeed.

But among all of her passions, music was always her main focus since the start of her remarkable career, which has earned her multiple accolades (2001 Best Montreal International Music Initiative Award / 2002 UK Underground Music Awards’ Best Breakthrough DJ / 2009 GAMIQ’s Best Electronic Album of the Year Awards and 2010 Canada’s JUNO Awards’ Best Dance Album of the Year nomination for “I’m No Human” / 2014 MTL Awards’ Best Montreal DJ, to name a few). Her extensive discography is found among the world’s best Techno labels, including her own, launched in 1999 under the name Relentless, which became Iturnem in 2003. Barbara Brown used to be her alter-ego used for her softer productions, but she now releases all her music under her main name, regardless of the style, as she did for her albums I’m No Human and Many Shades of Grey. This might confuse her most loyal techno fans, although they should rest assured that she will never stray away from her first true love: Techno.

name: Moisees
bio:
Booking: moises@borninmexico.tv
Contact: moises@durolabel.com

Moisees is a musician, producer, and DJ from Mexico City. His music and DJ sets showcase a combination of techno, house, and indie dance, creating a diverse and psychedelic listening experience. Over the years, he has gained a reputation for delivering DJ performances at festivals, clubs, and parties worldwide, including Lux Fragil (Lisbon), Klein Phönix (Istanbul), Sisyphos (Berlin), Kaputt (Bogotá), Topaz Deluxe (Monterrey), Casa Cobra (Guadalajara), M.N. Roy (CDMX), Funk (CDMX), EDC Mexico, among others. 

He has released music on labels such as Duro Label, Get Physical, Nothing Is Real, Roam Recording, etc. Both his music and his remixes have been well-received by specialized electronic music media such as Mixmag Mexico, Faze Magazin, Deep House Amsterdam, DJ Mag, etc. 

Moisees co-founded Duro Label with Theus Mago in 2015, an independent record label specializing in indie dance and techno music from various parts of the world. In recent years, Duro Label has become an international reference, with support from prominent artists such as Andrew Weatherall, Jennifer Cardini, Dixon, Solumun, and WhoMadeWho, to name a few. In November 2022, Duro Label was selected as 'Label of the Month' by Beatport, further solidifying its reputation as a leading independent record label in the electronic music scene.   

In 2022, Duro started “Muy Duro,” its first series of curated label nights around the world with the objective of further spreading the raw, eclectic, indie-rave sound that characterizes the label's releases. “Muy Duro” was celebrated in different cities like Mexico City, Bogotá, Madrid, Istanbul, Berlin, among others. This initiative has strengthened Duro Label's presence on the global circuit.
