In 2024, møji performed 60+ shows across Australia, Asia, and Europe, earning a reputation as one of the most exciting live acts. 

As the founder of @unchainedlabel, a hard techno label and events brand, he continues to shape the future of the genre with sold-out shows and game-changing releases.

From commanding international stages to leading Asia’s underground scene, møji is relentlessly pushing the limits of what he can become.

name: Mona Lee
bio:
Mona Lee is a DJ, producer and vocalist that brings a soulful blend of disco and House music. Supported by Kerri Chandler, as a dynamic performer she leaves her mark on audiences with live singing.

​She’s played around the globe at renowned venues like Nitsa or Brunch Electronik (Barcelona), Rex Club or Djoon (Paris), Sisyphos, Watergate or Garbicz Festival (Berlin), UNVRS, Club Chinois or Pikes (Ibiza), Colorado Charlie or LoFi (Amsterdam) and Traum Club or Tomorrowland (Belgium).

​​Mona her deeper love for US House music is clearly reflected in the music she creates, the producers she collaborates with, and the labels she releases on. Worth mentioning are Kaoz Theory (US), S&S Recordings (US), NuFaze Records (US), House Puff (FR), We Play House Recordings (BE), De La Groove (Fr), Anxiety Therapy or Heattraxx (GE).
Her release called “Joyful life” with Kerri Chandler on his album “Spaces & Places” (Kaoz Theory), got nominated as best album of the year 2022 by MixMag. Two years later, “You Make me Stronger” that came out on Kaoz Theory (April 2024), got featured in Mixmag Brazil. Her very first EP "Mona Lee Presents" as a U.S. Series on We Play House Recordings got remixed by artists like Stefan Ringer and Red D and has been widely shared by many House music lovers. Pressed on vinyl and distributed by Rush Hour Amsterdam, you can find the album in many record shops.

​Her DJ career started off in Belgium when she was 19 years old, with a residency at the renowned club Decadance. As her international DJ career took off, her first Sonar off gig sparked a love affair with Barcelona. Living in the vibrant city since 2019, she became part of DROP, a DJ collective and party concept inspired by the iconic parties of 80s Chicago and New York, such as The Loft or Paradise Garage. For over 12 years, Mona has been carving her path as both a DJ and vocalist, taking her voice and music across borders and stages around the world. Connecting with audiences all over Europe to Brazil and the US, her journey has been one of passion, resilience, and deep connection through music.​

name: Monika Kruse
bio:
Clubbing was in its infancy when Berlin-born Monika Kruse began her first residency at the Babalu bar in Munich, where she grew up. Classically trained in piano from the age of four, Monika has always had a love of music and her early sets spanned hip hop, funk, soul and early deep and vocal house. This new breed of electronic music seized Monika’s soul and imagination. Dance music was in its infancy and since there were few clubs where you could play techno she threw her own parties in illegal venues ranging from World War II bunkers to trams to empty houses. Fortunately the police were a little behind the musical curve… “I had some funny experiences,” she recalls, “But nice ones! They stopped us once in a tram because they thought the smoke machine was a fire!” On another occasion, they came and asked her to turn down the bass so the house they were playing in wouldn’t crumble. “Luckily, they didn’t have a clue about techno!” 
	
Monika Kruse's star is shining brighter than ever with a global fan-base hungry for her irresistible beats. In 2014 her club appearances included Space Ibiza with Carl Cox, Amnesia Ibiza with Marco Carola, We Love... at Space Ibiza, Sankeys Ibiza, Egg London and regular sets for her residency at Berghain Berlin.

She dazzled the festivals, too, playing events such as Time Warp, Melt Festival, 18 Hour Festival, Eastern Electrics UK, Ultra Music Festival in Miami and South America, Sonus Croatia, Awakenings ADE, and SEMF Stuttgart. She also hosted a stage at Amsterdam's Edit Festival, showcasing some of her favourite artists such as Pig & Dan, Nick Curly and Miss Kittin.
Classically trained in piano, Monika's love of music is broad and deep. She grew up buying records, accumulating a music collection that grew to span funk, soul, hip hop, and house music. When the revolutionary rhythms coming out of Chicago and Detroit captured her imagination it led her to throw parties in illegal venues including World War II bunkers, trams and empty houses.

Electronic music culture has evolved rapidly since those early days but Monika's talent and passion is constant. “My ethos is ‘sweat with a smile,’” she says. “I give love to my audience and they give it back. LOVE – it’s the best thing in the world. My aim is to help people forget whatever is going on in their life and have a little holiday – just get lost in my music.”
Monika is also an active producer. Her Terminal M label celebrates its 15th anniversary in 2015 and she chalked up hits this year with Pig & Dan collaboration 'Soulstice', a Beatport Top 10 techno anthem. The fantastic remix package of 'Summer Drops' was also a Beatport chart favourite, featuring Monika's track reworked by Nicole Moudaber, Uner, and Mendo. With just two releases Monika was one of Beatport's Top 100 techno artists for 2014. Look out for the special re-release of the album Monika Kruse @ Voodooamt 'Passengers' in celebration of Terminal M's 15th birthday.

Monika’s passion for spreading the love extends beyond the dancefloor, too. In 2000 she founded a charity called No Historical Backspin to fight racism and homophobia. “It’s sad and ridiculous that people still get beat up, or in some countries even killed, for being gay. Or get treated badly because of their skin colour, or gender, or because they’re a refugee” she says. “But it happens. Sharing and caring is the only way to make the world a safe place for everyone. It is important for DJs to show they respect everyone.” She is currently organising a No Historical Backspin party at Berghain. Funds raised will go to Amadeu Antonio Stiftung, which supports victims of hate-crimes and campaigns against right-wing extremism.
Her charity work, like her DJing and production, is an expression of Monika’s faith in the transforming power of music. “It was my first love,” she says. “Music was my best friend. It never let me down. In good times music was there and in bad times music was there.”

name: Monolink

Singer-songwriter and electronic music producer. To many that might sound like two very different aspects of modern sound culture - which in turn makes Monolink a fascinating character, because he's both rolled into one. His style seamlessly connects the narrative structure of a song with the compelling forward thrust of electronic rhythms. Guitar chords merge into synthetic pad sounds, hypnotic bass vibrations meet emotional vocal parts, passionate physicality meets sublime stimulation for the mind.

name: Monsieur Van Pratt
bio:
Label owner of @superspicyrecords

Monsieur Van Pratt, founder of Super Spicy Records, is a prominent producer and DJ originally from Mexico City, whose influence on
electronic music is widely recognized both nationally and internationally. With an impressive career that includes more than 100 releases in digital format and 30+ on vinyl, which consolidate him as a key figure in the genre.
His music has been released by prestigious record labels such as Toy Tonics (coming on 2025), The Disco Express, Tropical Disco Records and Buddha Bar, among others, underlining his status on the global scene. His ability to fuse genres, attention and styles has captured that of critics and the public, leading him to collaborate and remix a series of renowned international and national artists. Among his most notable collaborations are works with Derrick McKenzie, drummer of Jamiroquai; Drop Out Orchestra, Art Of Tones, amongst others. Each of these collaborations has allowed him to explore new musical dimensions, enriching his characteristic sound with diverse and fresh influences.
With a musical style deeply rooted in disco, funk and jazz, Monsieur Van Pratt combines classical elements with contemporary touches, creating a sound experience that is both nostalgic and innovative. His work not only stands out for its technical quality, but also for its ability to connect emotionally with the listener, making him a central figure in the evolution of modern dance sound.

name: Morgin Madison
bio:
New album "Odyssey" out now 💙

https://solo.to/morginmadison

Contact: contact@morginmadison.com

For the better part of a decade, Morgin Madison has been a singular uncompromising force in dance music.

With numerous Billboard Top 40 Dance records and years of touring history with the likes of deadmau5, Tritonal, NERO, Kaskade, No Mana and more, Morgin Madison’s blossoming career is set to stand the test of time. A true product of his earliest inspirations, Madison’s musical catalog stretches across every corner of melodic dance music. He aims for musical storytelling above all else. 

From Red Rocks to EDC Las Vegas, Morgin Madison has packed more into the first few years of his career than many achieve in a decade. Back in late 2020, Madison caught the attention of deadmau5, and soon thereafter found a home at mau5trap, paving the way for his debut LP, Living the Phantasm (April 2021). 

After years of consistent touring and Billboard Dance charting singles across mau5trap and Enhanced Recordings, 2024 brought with it Morgin Madison’s second studio album, “Odyssey” – a massive 16 track project and the culmination of his life’s work. 

“Odyssey is an album inspired by the last 3 years of my life. I went from total lockdown in 2020 to being given these massive opportunities I didn’t really expect or feel I deserved. It was incredible, but I wasn’t really grounded mentally for a solid 2 years straight in hindsight. ‘Odyssey’ is about finding that genuine spark to sit back and create something big, new, and inspiring again through all the noise.”

name: Moritz Hofbauer
bio:
Born in 1998, Moritz Hofbauer grew up in Pforzheim, southern Germany. He came in touch with music at an early age, playing cello in the local orchestra or keyboard in a band. His curiosity drove him to combine this love for music with drum machines and synthesizers. He began to complement his piano compositions with electronic beats and his passion for Deep House and Melodic Techno evolved quickly. 
By the age of 15, Moritz was taking his first bookings and spending nights in the DJ booth of local clubs. With his release “In Between“ on Jeudi Records in 2015, Moritz set a first milestone in his budding career. Several releases and remixes for artists such as Township Rebellion, Ben Böhmer and Nils Hoffmann followed.
Over the next years he steadily established himself within the clubbing scene and has since hit stages like the Docks in Hamburg, the Harry Klein in Munich as well as festivals such as the Sonne Mond Sterne Festival or the Isle Of Summer.  
Moritz has already released on numerous labels and his productions entered the sets of artists such as Dirty Doering, Township Rebellion, Marcus Meinhardt or Aka Aka. 
With his music he follows his vision of a unique sound that bridges melody, art and club fever, continuously searching for new pigments to add to his musical palette. 
As the latest member of the FCKNG SERIOUS family around superstar Boris Brejcha Moritz performs live at their global label night events.

name: MoRsei
bio:
MoRsei is the Psychedelic Trance project by Francisco Manzano from Buenos Aires, Argentina.

It all began in 2013 when he attended his first Psytrance festival, quickly falling in love with the captivating music and its unique scene. He was left with a sense of inspiration in his heart that he had never felt before. Finally, in 2015 he decided that he wanted to create that experience for others. He began self-learning music production by watching tutorials online, carefully sculpting his distinct high-powered sound over time. Drawing inspiration from the likes of Hans Zimmer, and his favorite band Tool, MoRsei's music not only submerges you into a deep musical journey, but also into a rich cinematic experience filled with organic sounds and melodic textures that characterize his signature sound. This eventually led to the release of high-quality tracks that took the “Full-On” scene by storm, landing at the number one spot of the Beatport Psytrance top multiple times. Over the years he closely cooperated with many labels like Shamanic Tales, Mutant Disco Records, Digital Om, etc. In 2025 he joined the ranks of long running Belgian label Dacru Records.

MoRsei has completed many successful collaborations with other top artists in the scene. Recently he also started a side project together with DigiCult under the name Arcana. With every new release he solidifies his name as one of the most impactful contemporary psytrance producers.

name: MOSKA
bio:
Daniel Amézquita – better known to millions of fans around the world as Colombian DJ and producer MOSKA – already counts a storied career at the very heights of electronic dance music. 

Championed by none other than Tiësto, from the very start of his musical journey MOSKA was held up as one to watch. Singles on imprints including Spinnin’ Records, Musical Freedom, Mad Decent, Hexagon, Generation Hex, Armada Music, In Rotation, Wall Recordings and Ultra Records cemented that status, as did releases with and remixes for Major Lazer, J Balvin, Luis Fonzi, Daddy Yankee, Calvin Harris, Laidback Luke, Galantis and of course, Tiësto himself. 

In the DJ booth MOSKA has been equally prolific. Explosive sets have lit up stages at Tomorrowland in both Brazil and its hallowed homeland in Belgium, TomorrowWorld in Atlanta USA, EDC Orlando, Life In Color Miami and Storyland Cartagena among others. His clubland journey is just as glittering. Amnesia and Pacha on the white isle of Ibiza, LIV, Story and Space in Miami, Pacha and Webster Hall in New York City, Avalon in Hollywood LA – the list goes on, and on. 

As with any artist that pushes themself to grow and stretch their creative muscle, freely exploring their artistic direction, the past year has seen MOSKA’s style transition towards a deeper, more groove-laden style. Drawing heavily from the LATAM influences that surround him, MOSKA’s production as he moves through 2022 has much more of a House vibe, bringing in elements of Tech, Progressive, Afro and Latin House. It’s a direction his fans are more than comfortable with, MOSKA’s music reaching them not just in the clubs and on the Main Stage but now also via his monthly AMULETO RADIO show.

name: Moziz
bio:
At a very early age Moziz (21) started his musical jourey, by gathering tracks that really spoke to him, tracks that weren't really popular with his peers, he wasn't afraid to be 'different' than the others.

Today you can clearly tell he stands out with his own productions and only focuses on productions he enjoys.

It all started with Moziz researching the World Wide Web for songs that really emotionally touched him on another level. Being born & raised in Belgium really opened up many possibilities for him namely because Belgium had a HUGE retro house scene back then and still do to this day.

People from his local area came to him asking him to burn some off the music he found onto CDs. This sparked a flame inside of him and he started to delve deeper into the electronic music scene. He discovered many great artists, the track that got Moziz hooked on electronic music was definently his favourite called "Glow" by Cirez D, better known as Pryda or Eric Prydz.

Seeing as he had gathered a big arsenal of songs, the next logical step for him was to start DJing, so he got his first all-in-one mixer and started to learn the basics.

On this journey he met a few friends, and they convinced him to start producing his own music aswell. Shortly after he made his debut on the producing scene with the track 'The Energy' that released on Mystic Carousel's compilation album which combined soulfull melodies together with a great vocal to back it up.

Few months passed and he came out with another track called 'Atomic' which has been released on "Ethereal Future" and has been featured on MixMag Turkey. Atomic found it's way upto the Italian duo of Carmine & Matteo better known as Tale of Us, they premiered his song in the Loft at 2019's ADE thus kickstarting his professional carreer.

bio:
MUSIC FOR THE DANCEFLOOR AND BEYOND
Mr Joy is a genuinely dedicated electronic music lover, spreading bliss on the dancefloor for over 20 years!
Once known as pure Tech House DJ, Xavier Shimtshack, he rebranded in 2018, expanding his horizons to bars, restaurants, and parties with a more commercial edge. Under his new name, he crafts unforgettable moments that awaken a true sense of being alive.
As a DJ-only performer, he stands out through his rare skill for uncovering hidden musical treasures. With more than 10 appearances at Tomorrowland, he’s proven his place among the greats.
Music speaks louder than words, so dive into his sets and feel the magic for yourself. His refined versatility is bound to surprise and inspire you!

name: MUNA
bio: MUNA’s journey has always been about bringing to light the complex, messy, ecstatic realities of life, and with their fourth album, Dancing On The Wall, they’ve never been sharper, darker, or more exhilarating. Emerging from the sparkly, confetti-strewn heights of their 2022 self-titled record, MUNA now channel the raw, anxious, and sweat-soaked energy of living in a city (Los Angeles) of unrelenting heat, a corrupted world wrought by political tension, and the quieter and more personal pressures of millennial precarity and heartache in these uncertain times. The result is a record that feels both intimate and spectacular: a fast-paced, hard-edged dance pop world built with teeth, wit, and emotional resonance—a soundtrack for hearts on fire amidst the tumult of modern life.

Originally from UK, MUZIC moved to Asia in 2019, making his mark across top venues and is now based at WAVE Taipei (#28 on DJMAG Top 100 Clubs)

MUZIC is naturally the life of the party, igniting crowds and bringing the rave sound to the dancefloor - fusing techno, trance, mixed with other EDM elements - breaking the boundaries between genres with mainstage power.  A well-seasoned resident for many top clubs, MUZIC has headlined shows around the globe and shared the stage alongside numerous DJMAG Top 100 DJ’s and worldwide guests. 

His growth has also led to appearances at major festivals such as Ultra Music Festival (Hong Kong, Taiwan) and S2O Festival (Bangkok, Taiwan). MUZIC’s eurasian appeal also extends to luxury brands such as Chanel, LV, Gucci and more.

Muzzy Obaidi a.k.a MUZZ is one of the UK’s most unique and exciting artists in electronic music. Nicknamed ‘the blueprint’ by many of his peers, MUZZ’s sound, production values and imagination has influenced all corners of electronic music, earning him legendary status among fans and musicians alike.

MUZZ describes his music as ‘Hybrid’ - taking all the richest qualities from drum & bass and industrial rock, all the way through to classical and ambient music. MUZZ’s sonic universe is incredibly deep, soaked in aesthetics that signify all emotions from harsh brutalist attitudes, to lush cinematic euphoria. 

As a charting musician, MUZZ has performed at some of the world’s biggest festivals and shows, from taking on the Basspod at EDC Las Vegas, to the Radio 1 Stage at Reading & Leeds Festival in the UK. Pair that with several sold-out club shows across the globe, MUZZ is undoubtedly a force to be reckoned with in the world of electronic music.

My name is Christophe and music is my life. I started playing music at 16 years old, DJing locally at my hometown & touring since a young age. By the time I was 17, there was no doubt in my mind about what I wanted from my life. I wanted to make people forget their daily stressful life, to make people unite and share fun together, evading the world issues and celebrating all together. I moved from France to Spain and then Miami and started to live my dream with all of you. I played for the first time at Ultra Music Festival in 2012 in a little stage and it was amazing, personally i will never forget that day. The year after i made my debut at the Main Stage of Ultra and since then i have been playing Ultra Music Festival Main Stages worldwide and touring clubs and festivals all around the world.

As the founder of Jockey Combat, N.A.H has created a platform to showcase his unique sound and connect with fans worldwide. His music blends genres like Bass House, Electro House, Garage, Trap, and Dubstep, delivering powerful drops that energize dance floors and festivals alike.

Time moves in cycles and Naethan is one of those rare artists who knows how to bend them.

The Belgian-Greek producer and DJ represents a musical reincarnation, a new chapter built on nearly 15 years of evolution under a previous alias. His work merges emotional depth with forward-leaning electronic design, balancing nostalgia with contemporary club energy. Versatility defines his approach, both in composition and in performance, where he moves with precision between hypnotic, narrative-driven sets and high-impact dancefloor moments.

Naethan’s catalogue includes releases on Amaeo, Kiosk ID, Sincopat, Ontourage, Nightcolours, and his own imprint Kanvas. His Amaeo release featured a collaboration with Lazarusman, while his Katy EP on Kiosk ID received remixes from Motip White, Julian Koerndl, and Aemgydala. His music has been supported by Solomun, Sasha, Mira, Argia, Toto Chiavetta, Aera, Marc Depulse, and Maxim Lany, among others.

From Pukkelpop and We Can Dance to Tomorrowland, Naethan delivers sets engineered to be both introspective and physical — environments where past and present converge on the dancefloor.

name: Nana Kohat
bio:
Nana Kohat is an electronic music DJ known for her creative mixing and authentic performances that uniquely combine classic and contemporary elements. With roots in the São Paulo music scene, Nana incorporates elements of 80s and 90s house, breaks, acid, progressive house, and Miami bass into her sets, which are her main artistic influences.

One of Nana's great qualities is her sonic versatility. Over the past year, this characteristic has led her to perform at diverse events, ranging from major clubs like Warung Beach Club and Warung Tour, to renowned festivals like Universo Paralello and Coala Festival, as well as more underground parties like Gop Tun, Cardume, and Domply. Her performance repertoire also includes bars like Caracol, Gaspar, and Heavyhouse, as well as renowned clubs, major parties, and festivals such as D. Edge SP and RJ, Closer By Eli Iwasa, Colours, 5uinto, Ephigenia, and Bruma. Nana also participated in two editions of Virtual Burning Man, including producing one of the stages at the Irupe stage in the 2020 edition.

In addition to performing at the main nightlife venues across Brazil, Nana has shared the booth with several prominent international names, such as Chloé Caillet, Alan Dixon, Jex Opolis, Audiofly, Mr. Ho, George Smeddles, Mala Ika, and Tornado Wallace, among others.

With a deep fascination for music and its ecosystem, Nana conveys her sensitivity through a variety of musical styles, which keeps her artistic approach in constant evolution. Her passion for music is evident in every performance, making her an authentic and sophisticated figure in the electronic music scene.

name: Nautica
bio:
@tydelabel 🌊 // Bookings: mike@luma-agency.co

Josh Lewis and Caolan Savage have been making waves under their Nautica moniker for almost a decade, cementing themselves as mainstays across the UK club and festival circuit in recent years. Known for their signature deep, rolling Tech House sound, their discography spans some of House music’s finest imprints, landing on Three Six Zero, Cecille, 8Bit, PIV, Knee Deep In Sound and Solid Grooves to name just a few. 

2025 saw the pair take flight, from remixing House music royalty Groove Armada on DFTD, to landing one of the best-selling House records of Q4 with their track “Sway” on the legendary 8Bit Records, supported by the likes of Jamie Jones, Joseph Capriati, Seth Troxler, Hot Since 82, Franky Rizardo and more.

Since the inception of their imprint TYDE in 2023 they’ve found a home for some of their biggest records, running their own parties and bringing a deeper spin to the UK tech house space, consistently pushing the boundaries of their own creative vision as label owners and promoters.

Having brushed shoulders with industry heavyweights at institutions like The Warehouse Project, DC-10 Ibiza, Creamfields, Parklife, Fabric London, Motion Bristol and many more in recent years, they now set their sights on the international stage - no signs of slowing down as they enter ten years in the game…

name: Neelix
bio:
There's only one obvious thing in the sound of Neelix: Relentless forward boost. Exactly how this boost is generated is not obvious at all – which makes it catchy in the most subliminal way possible. The German artist playfully incorporates elements of Progressive Trance, Progressive House and Electro. However, the actual magic of Neelix happens somewhere inbetween those genres. For 10 years already this unique formula made him a crowd-pleaser at a great variety of dance events on all 5 continents, including monumental festivals like Electric Daisy Carnival, Tomorrowland or Boom.

It's 2005 when Neelix stirs a revolution. His album 'No Way To Leave' fulfills all the expectations of the dance floor – but it does so in the most unexpected way. Within no time, party goers refer to his highly dynamic hybrid style simply as 'Neelix sound'. It's the beginning of a stellar career that keeps building and building – just like a typical Neelix track itself. During the last decade, the music of Neelix has inspired a whole generation of producers, it can be found in the collections of countless DJ, in film productions, and in the catalogues of prestigious labels like for instance SpinTwist Records or Paul Oakenfold’s legendary Perfecto imprint.

name: NEKTER
bio:
Los Angeles–based DJ and Insomniac Radio host NEKTER delivers what she calls a techno sound bath—a hypnotic fusion of textures, noise, and healing frequencies designed to scratch every corner of the brain. Active in the electronic music scene since 2020, she has quickly become one of the most compelling new artists rising from the global underground.

A force in LA’s warehouse movement, NEKTER appears frequently on respected lineups for 6AM, Dirty Epic, WORK, Incognito, and Synthetik Minds. Her ascent has placed her alongside major techno figures including Ben Block, Ben Sims, Luke Slater, Ø [Phase], and milestone performances opening for Amelie Lens and Charlotte de Witte. She is now in her second year as a resident at WORK in Los Angeles.

Alongside her shows, NEKTER is carving out a role as a tastemaker on Insomniac Radio, where she brings underground sound, culture, and commentary to a global audience. Her broadcasting work bridges rave-floor edge with accessible curation, helping shape the future of electronic music while championing emerging artists and forward-thinking sonics.

Rooted in over a decade of yoga and meditation practice, NEKTER designs her sets as somatic, psychedelic journeys—shadow-embracing, emotional, and sexy as fuck. Whether opening, closing, or commanding peak time, she brings a spiritually charged, embodied approach to techno. With hypnotic rhythms, groovy melodies, and mind-melting bass, NEKTER offers a transformative, full-body experience every time she steps behind the decks.

name: NELA
bio:
for booking requests - patci@wilde-agency.com 

Nela’s serious love affair with music started when she was just a child playing the piano. Her discovery of electronic music was an intense breakthrough where she realized that she didn't just want to play music but she got inspired to create it. By embracing this new journey with drive, devotion and a deep intuition, Nela's purpose is to inspire people on the deepest creative level, the way only music can.

Hailing from Tel Aviv, it wasn't long before Nela made a name for herself in the local music scene as an artist with an influential and unique vision. She rose to international acclaim very quickly, performing on every stage in Israel alongside established artists from around the world. But Nela wanted to pursue her dream even further, beyond her wild success at home. She moved to Berlin to join a new generation of artists in pure electronic music, in the famed city where it all began. 


Inspiration followed soon after her bold move to Berlin and Nela began to focus on producing music. She combines different styles: heavy techno grooves accentuated by percussions and deep, hypnotic melodies- music that is driven to addict. Nela is regularly sought out by some of the most exciting and high profile international nightclubs & festivals in Israel, France, the United Kingdom, Germany, Greece, the Netherlands & South Africa. She plays regularly at Kosmonaut, Ritter Butzke in Berlin and at Scorpios in Mykonos.

name: Nick Bril
bio:
Multi crafted as a person, started Dj-ing when his main professional career got him into the music scene. On one hand owner of one of the world’s most renown restaurants, on the other a strong selector. Played many clubs, festivals and events worldwide.

After releasing 2 albums with The Jane Antwerp, his newest project is about to see the limelight, in collaboration with “Armada Music” called EN:CLOSE. An artistic project where his passion for mixing different arts is shown, with 13 a track produced album featuring artists such as Sebastian Mullaert, Gerd Janson, Anfisa Letyago , Eelke Kleijn and Marino Canal. 

The music he brings is moving from the deeper sound of melodic techno with a strong connection to vocal driven moments in a club environment, towards a more colorful rhythmic afro inspired daytime moment to respect the spirit of an open-air atmosphere. Always aiming to bring something fresh though energetic and fun.

name: Nick Curly
bio: Nick Curly is a German DJ and producer from Mannheim. He founded 8Bit and Cécille Records. His productions focus on tech house and techno with sophisticated aesthetics. Regular performances at Panorama Bar, DC10, and international venues. His sound emphasizes groove and precision within the German tech house tradition.

name: Nick Garcia
bio:
A Bay Area transplant from Orange County, California, Nick Garcia (aka DJ Nick G) grew up in a household filled with musical expression. He began playing various instruments at a young age, discovering his knack for music early on. When introduced to house music in '95, at the age of 13, he fell in love. He acquired a set of turntables and never looked back. 

Since then, Nick has made a name for himself spearheading phenomenal house events of all shapes and sizes with different crews in both L.A. and the Bay Area, featuring world-class talent. Nick has contributed to the scene in the studio as well, releasing originals and remixes on labels like Vinyl Assassins, Soluble Recordings, Jump Recordings, Ginkgo Music, Marinated Music, MONOSIDE, Uniting Souls, and Dufflebag. His tracks have appeared on various compilations, most notably Fabric 56: Derrick Carter. He partnered with Oscar Miranda to form the dynamic duo RARE STATIC and took on label boss duties for the Funky Farm imprint in 2010.  

While Nick draws the bulk of his inspiration from West Coast and Chicago underground house, his sound spans a wide range, from deep and soulful to jackin’ and funky, with influences of tribal and tech house. Known for his energetic, bouncy, and groovy style, he’s able to rock the nightclubs and ultra lounges while feeling right at home in a dark, gritty warehouse.

name: Nick Havsen
bio:
Bigroom power & maximum energy anthems
Management: reinier@talktothemanagement.com
info@nickhavsen.com

Mixing, Mastering, Ghost Production: info@nickhavsen.com
-------------------------------------------
BIO:

Nick Havsen, the electrifying DJ and music producer hailing from Romania, has firmly established himself as a prominent figure in the global electronic music scene. His exceptional work in the "Bigroom" genre captivates crowds with high-energy DJ sets that leave audiences in awe.

With an impressive catalog of releases on top-rated record labels such as Rave Culture, Revealed Recordings, Smash The House, Armada, TurnItUp Muzik, Reaching Altitude, and more, Nick Havsen has proven his artistry through a string of successful singles and remixes, collaborating with top-tier DJs. With over 500,000 monthly Spotify listeners, his tracks have garnered millions of streams and earned recognition on prominent radio shows, and playlists worldwide.

Renowned for his distinctive old-schoolish Bigroom sound, characterized by massive kicks, explosive drops, and soaring melodies, Nick Havsen is a driving force behind the genre's popularity, earning the support of renowned AAA DJs like W&W, Dimitri Vegas & Like Mike, Hardwell, Blasterjaxx, KSHMR, Timmy Trumpet, and others.

Having graced renowned stages at festivals and clubs worldwide, including Ultra Europe (Croatia), Untold Festival (Romania), ADE (the Netherlands), Balaton Sound (Hungary), Play House (China), Neversea (Romania) and more, Nick Havsen is an internationally acclaimed artist.

His music pushes the boundaries of the evolving "Bigroom" sound, leaving a lasting impression on the world of electronic music. Through unwavering passion and dedication to his craft, Nick Havsen solidifies his position as an influential force in the worldwide dance scene. Welcome to the Bigroom Army!

"Bigroom is an addiction, Bigroom is life!" - Nick Havsen

name: NICOLE CHEN
bio:
Classically trained in piano since the age of four, Nicole Chen has spent over 14 years establishing herself as one of Asia’s most in-demand electronic music artists, while simultaneously growing a powerful digital footprint as a content creator.

Blending artistry with entrepreneurship, Nicole has successfully merged her music career with content creation, using social media storytelling, short-form video, and digital campaigns to scale her DJ presence globally. Her distinctive fusion of high-energy performances, visual creativity, and lifestyle content has positioned her as one of the most recognisable female DJs in Asia, collaborating with major festivals, brands, and tourism boards worldwide.

In the DJane Top 100 (2024), Nicole is ranked #1 in Singapore and #44 in Asia, underscoring both her musical talent and cultural influence across the region.

Nicole is now looking to expand her reach in the Middle East by relocating to Dubai, a global hub for entertainment and innovation. Her goal is to contribute to the UAE’s creative ecosystem by developing new collaborations, live experiences, and digital projects that connect global audiences through music and media.

Exploring the boundaries of Mainstage Techno and Trance, Nifra has been causing a stir with her dynamic musical evolution, injecting a refreshing energy into the genre and igniting every dancefloor she graces. One of  the "20 of 2024" selected by Tomorrowland and an integral part of ‘Future Of Dance 2024’; a highly regarded group selected by 1001Tracklists including 101 producers anticipated to shape the future, the compelling Slovakian born Nifra is a force to be reckoned with. A true ambassador for women across the globe in electronic music, Nikoleta's passion is undeniable, while her intensity is hard to beat. Her devotion to music started in her teenage years and soon electronic music was her ride or die, making her one of the most in demand DJ’s alongside Tiesto, Paul van Dyk and Armin van Buuren at standout events like ASOT1000, Southern California’s Beyond Wonderland and the Festival X tour in Australia. 2023 welcomes some of Nifra’s biggest shows to date, including Tomorrowland and Creamfields amongst an epic string of new music dropping, making the #10 spot and highest ranked female trance artist on Trancepodium.

name: Noel Sanger
bio:
Noel Sanger is an artist who, while flying mostly under the mainstream radar, has cultivated a rich musical history along the way. His releases dating back to the 1990s remain in high demand, and his current work, always critically acclaimed, continues to see top DJ support. 

Releasing on some of dance music’s top labels, with a recent focus on his own Dissident Music imprint, he has made regular appearances in Beatport’s top ten genre charts, as well as top tens at the Billboard Dance Club Chart, and the top 15 of UK Musicweek’s buzz chart. 

Over the years, his work has been heard on labels such as Black Hole, Spinnin’, Armada, Perfecto, High Contrast, Lost Language, Coldharbour, Mute, Dissident and dozens more. He has remixed and worked with artists like  Erasure, Nadia Ali, John Taylor of Duran Duran, Matt Darey, Soul In The Machine (with Twin Peaks star Chrysta Bell), and Markus Schulz. 

Noel toured extensively as North American warm-up for the best known DJ of all time, Tiesto, and even mixed “Summerbreeze 2,” the follow-up to Tiesto’s “Summerbreeze” mix CD on Nettwerk Recordings. Later, he was invited by no less than BT to collaborate on tracks for Tiesto’s Grammy-nominated 2006 album “Elements Of Life.” 

Evolving to deeper sounds, Noel’s label, Dissident Music, was first launched in 2007 and produced a number of hits throughout the ensuing 7 years. Recently relaunched as part of Miami’s Essential Media Group, Dissident has gone from strength to strength, closing out 2021 with three top ten Beatport releases in a row. 

As a DJ, Noel has manned the booth at some of the world’s best clubs, sharing the stage with some of electronic music’s top names. He has played at festivals such as Ultra Music Festival and Electric Daisy Carnival (Orlando) and his South Florida residencies have hosted some of the biggest names in dance music, with Noel playing to hundreds and even thousands of eager clubbers each week. Now residing in Orlando, Noel plays select shows nationwide and spends his weeks in the studio, remixing and preparing for his upcoming releases. 

It isn’t always the case that after this many years, an artist remains as creative and relevant as Noel has. But between his productions, his label, and his expertise behind the decks, Noel is proving without question that the best is yet to come.

name: North Base
bio:
NORTH BASE = RAM Records, Sony, BMG, Viper Recordings, Nemesis Recordings, KOOL FM 

NORTH BASE have been in the game for over 30 years as Silver & Prophecy or Sonic & Silver, Accidental Heroes and other Alias over time. That’s nearly 3 decades of club Nights, Festivals, releases and much more. Manchester's Drum & Bass export have been causing serious damage within the dance music circuit for quite some time now. Regularly placed on lineups alongside Chase & Status, BOU, Andy C, Hybrid Minds, Shy FX and many more the duo have certainly made a strong impact globally with in the scene.

Already having played at some of the top music festivals and clubs worldwide including Glastonbury, Amnesia Ibiza, Fabric, WOMB(Japan) Andy C’s XOYO Residency, Warehouse Project Manchester (residents), Creamfields, Ultra Europe, Metropolis, Hideout, Parklife, Rampage and so many more to mention. 

NORTH BASE continue to tear up each and every club, festival and dance floor with their unique cutting edge DJ skills & productions & sort after dubs that have already gained support from the heavy weights of the DnB world such as Andy C, Bou, Hedex, Chase & Status, Hybrid Minds, Pendulum, Sub Focus and others, regularly supporting their tracks.

Having featured on BBC Radio1 & Radio1 Dance this year in 2025 with their amazing guest mix for Charlie Tee on her drum & bass show which has got a lot of people talking in the scene. The guys have have also gone on to remixed artists such as Craig David, Big Narstie, Ms Dynamite (OBE) Example, Benga, Skream, Laidback Luke, Sander Van Doorn, Labrinyth, and many more.

These guys are evolving each year from strength to strength and are serious game players within the drum and bass scene. Already starting the year off with a brand new album entitled ‘TRAVELING’ forthcoming. Do not sleep on NORTH BASE as this year these guys have a lot of music to drop…


For booking contact 
Management - silvermanagementuk@gmail.com
https://facebook.com/NORTHBASEUK
https://soundcloud.com/north-base
https://twitter.com/NORTHBASEUK
http://www.youtube.com/NORTHBASETVUK
http://www.instagram.com/NORTHBASEUK

name: Nothing But Funk
bio:
House. Disco. Sometimes even both.

Played at: Tomorrowland, Mysteryland, Dance Valley, Paaspop, Pinkpop, Extrema Belgium, We Are Electric, Solar Weekend, Escape Amsterdam, Paradiso Amsterdam, Dutch Week Val Thorens (FR), La Rocca, Versuz, Metz, MUST, Studio 80, IKON Antwerp, Paperclip, MAZE, Op Dreef and more.

With a Beatport number 1 position, several Traxsource Charted hits, supports by DJ's such as Tiesto, Max Vangelli, The Cube Guys, DJ PP, Dannic, Lucas & Steve and Moguai, a hit in the Belgian National Charts and about 150 gigs a year, you can tell Nothing But Funk's career is on the rise.
With his energetic and distinctive funky sound and DJ-skills, he sets his mark on every dancefloor. Organizations and venues such as Tomorrowland, Extrema Belgium, Solar Weekend, Red Bull Holland, Buro Pinkpop (well-known from the oldest music festival of Holland ‘Pinkpop’), Club Versuz Antwerp (BE), La Rocca Antwerp (BE), Club Penthouse Copenhagen (DK), Club Arteria Bologna (IT) are all on his resume.

Bookings: info@thunderagency.nl

name: Nukov & Yelmet
bio:
Nukov & Yelmet are two close friends from Belgium who have the same vision and taste when it comes to music. They have a very diverse sound together as the class themselves "men of music". There's good music and bad music and you'll find that the N&Y sound is the sound of the moment whatever that may be across all different types of genres. Perfect for us being all things Unsound or Underground. 
Having worked with artists like Kerri Chandler, wAFF, Solardo, Detlef, Nathan Barato, Matthias Tanzmann, Kolsch & many more with their SIRKUS brand. The duo need no more introduction with their music being signed to labels like Moon Harbour, Hot Creations & Moan.

name: NUSHA
bio:
"If you wanna dance till your shoes cry, you must check NUSHA"

NUSHA at the top of her game is the unique Romanian female artist who is involved into the international techno scene since 2015.
She has experimented and refined her musical taste throughout the years by sharing stages with well-known techno legends and playing some of the greatest techno festivals across the world.
Her releases are regularly to be found at labels such as: Filth On Acid, Armada Music, Autektone, FeChrome and her label KOMBUSTIVE.
NUSHA is moving towards the next chapter in her dynamic career, creating a positive chaos on the dancefloors around the globe.
Be ready to get a taste of Nusha!

name: Nymfo
bio:
A true DJ at heart with many years experience under his belt, Dutch DJ/producer Nymfo has established himself as a strong presence in the Drum and Bass scene with his skills in the studio as well as on the decks. Standout singles for RAM Records, Hospital Recordings and Metalheadz have made his name synonymous with tough, techno-tinged dancefloor drum & bass, 

Nymfo is constantly releasing music since 2007 on labels like Dispatch Recordings, CIA, Spearhead and Commercial Suicide. Nymfo has collaborated with Dutch artists like Black Sun Empire, Maduk and June Miller.
 
An accomplished DJ with a diverse selection, Nymfo has captivated crowds at festivals such as Tomorroland, Mystyerland and Lowlands, toured worldwide to destinations including North and South America, Australia, New Zealand and South Africa. 

“A 100% dnb crowd is lovely, but there are lots of people that don’t know the genre - that’s why I like it to play a party with a mixed up crowd and hope to convert some people to the lovely music that is dnb”

For bookings
